-- ----------------------------- 2022-10-27 add by liuxia--------------begin

-- 建表语句

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS T_LCDP_RESOURCE(
     ID BIGINT NOT NULL,
     RESOURCENAME VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
     RESOURCEDESC VARCHAR(180)  NULL ,
     RESOURCECATEGORY VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     PARENTID BIGINT NULL,
     ORDERNO BIGINT NULL,
     CONTENT TEXT NULL,
     EFFECTVERSION BIGINT NULL,
     PATH VARCHAR(360)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYNAME VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
     CREATEDTIME TIMESTAMP NULL,
     CREATEDBYORGID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYORGNAME VARCHAR(270)  NULL,
      PRIMARY KEY (ID)
);
comment on table T_LCDP_RESOURCE is '低代码平台资源表';
comment on column T_LCDP_RESOURCE.id is '主键';
comment on column T_LCDP_RESOURCE.resourceName is '资源名称';
comment on column T_LCDP_RESOURCE.resourceDesc is '资源描述';
comment on column T_LCDP_RESOURCE.resourceCategory is '资源类型(模块分类、模块、页面、前端脚本、后端脚本)';
comment on column T_LCDP_RESOURCE.parentId is '父ID';
comment on column T_LCDP_RESOURCE.orderNo is '排序码';
comment on column T_LCDP_RESOURCE.content is '内容';
comment on column T_LCDP_RESOURCE.effectVersion is '生效版本';
comment on column T_LCDP_RESOURCE.path is '资源路径';
comment on column T_LCDP_RESOURCE.createdById is '制单人编码';
comment on column T_LCDP_RESOURCE.createdByName is '制单人名称';
comment on column T_LCDP_RESOURCE.createdTime is '制单时间';
comment on column T_LCDP_RESOURCE.createdByOrgId is '制单人单位编码';
comment on column T_LCDP_RESOURCE.createdByOrgName is '制单人单位名称';


CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS T_LCDP_RESOURCE_HISTORY(
     ID BIGINT NOT NULL,
     RESOURCEID BIGINT NULL,
     RESOURCENAME VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
     RESOURCEDESC VARCHAR(180)  NULL ,
     RESOURCECATEGORY VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CONTENT TEXT NULL,
     VERSION BIGINT NULL,
     SUBMITFLAG VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     EFFECTFLAG VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYNAME VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
     CREATEDTIME TIMESTAMP NULL,
     CREATEDBYORGID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYORGNAME VARCHAR(270)  NULL,
      PRIMARY KEY (ID)
);
comment on table T_LCDP_RESOURCE_HISTORY is '低代码平台资源历史表';
comment on column T_LCDP_RESOURCE_HISTORY.id is '主键';
comment on column T_LCDP_RESOURCE_HISTORY.resourceId is '资源ID';
comment on column T_LCDP_RESOURCE_HISTORY.resourceName is '资源名称';
comment on column T_LCDP_RESOURCE_HISTORY.resourceDesc is '资源描述';
comment on column T_LCDP_RESOURCE_HISTORY.resourceCategory is '资源类型(模块分类、模块、页面、前端脚本、后端脚本)';
comment on column T_LCDP_RESOURCE_HISTORY.content is '内容';
comment on column T_LCDP_RESOURCE_HISTORY.version is '版本';
comment on column T_LCDP_RESOURCE_HISTORY.submitFlag is '是否提交';
comment on column T_LCDP_RESOURCE_HISTORY.effectFlag is '是否生效';
comment on column T_LCDP_RESOURCE_HISTORY.createdById is '制单人编码';
comment on column T_LCDP_RESOURCE_HISTORY.createdByName is '制单人名称';
comment on column T_LCDP_RESOURCE_HISTORY.createdTime is '制单时间';
comment on column T_LCDP_RESOURCE_HISTORY.createdByOrgId is '制单人单位编码';
comment on column T_LCDP_RESOURCE_HISTORY.createdByOrgName is '制单人单位名称';
CREATE INDEX IDX_LCDP_RESOURCE_HISTORY_RESOURCEID ON T_LCDP_RESOURCE_HISTORY (RESOURCEID);


CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS T_LCDP_MODULE_PAGE_COMP(
     ID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     MODULEPAGEHISTORYID BIGINT NULL,
     MODULEPAGEID BIGINT NULL,
     MODULEPAGEVERSION BIGINT NULL,
     COMPID VARCHAR(18)  NULL ,
     COMPCATEGORY VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     PARENTID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     PREVIOUSID BIGINT NULL,
     VISIBLE VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     EDITABLE VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CONFIG TEXT NULL,
     CREATEDBYID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYNAME VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
     CREATEDTIME TIMESTAMP NULL,
     CREATEDBYORGID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYORGNAME VARCHAR(270)  NULL,
      PRIMARY KEY (ID)
);
comment on table T_LCDP_MODULE_PAGE_COMP is '功能模块页面组件表';
comment on column T_LCDP_MODULE_PAGE_COMP.id is '前端组件UUID';
comment on column T_LCDP_MODULE_PAGE_COMP.modulePageHistoryId is '模块页面历史ID';
comment on column T_LCDP_MODULE_PAGE_COMP.modulePageId is '模块页面ID';
comment on column T_LCDP_MODULE_PAGE_COMP.modulePageVersion is '模块页面版本';
comment on column T_LCDP_MODULE_PAGE_COMP.compId is '组件ID';
comment on column T_LCDP_MODULE_PAGE_COMP.compCategory is '组件类型';
comment on column T_LCDP_MODULE_PAGE_COMP.parentId is '父组件ID';
comment on column T_LCDP_MODULE_PAGE_COMP.previousId is '前一组件id';
comment on column T_LCDP_MODULE_PAGE_COMP.visible is '是否可见';
comment on column T_LCDP_MODULE_PAGE_COMP.editable is '是否可编辑';
comment on column T_LCDP_MODULE_PAGE_COMP.config is '组件配置';
comment on column T_LCDP_MODULE_PAGE_COMP.createdById is '制单人编码';
comment on column T_LCDP_MODULE_PAGE_COMP.createdByName is '制单人名称';
comment on column T_LCDP_MODULE_PAGE_COMP.createdTime is '制单时间';
comment on column T_LCDP_MODULE_PAGE_COMP.createdByOrgId is '制单人单位编码';
comment on column T_LCDP_MODULE_PAGE_COMP.createdByOrgName is '制单人单位名称';
CREATE INDEX IDX_LCDP_MODULE_PAGE_COMP_MODULEPAGEID ON T_LCDP_MODULE_PAGE_COMP (MODULEPAGEID);


CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS T_LCDP_RESOURCE_LOCK(
     ID BIGINT NOT NULL,
     RESOURCEID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     RESOURCECATEGORY VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     LOCKUSERID VARCHAR(36)  NULL,
      PRIMARY KEY (ID)
);
comment on table T_LCDP_RESOURCE_LOCK is '低代码平台资源锁定';
comment on column T_LCDP_RESOURCE_LOCK.id is '主键';
comment on column T_LCDP_RESOURCE_LOCK.resourceId is '资源ID';
comment on column T_LCDP_RESOURCE_LOCK.resourceCategory is '资源类型';
comment on column T_LCDP_RESOURCE_LOCK.lockUserId is '锁定人员';
CREATE INDEX IDX_LCDP_RESOURCE_LOCK_RESOURCEID ON T_LCDP_RESOURCE_LOCK (RESOURCEID);


CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS T_LCDP_RESOURCE_VERSION(
     ID BIGINT NOT NULL,
     RESOURCEID VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
     RESOURCENAME VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
     RESOURCECATEGORY VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     VERSION BIGINT NULL,
     COMMIT VARCHAR(180)  NULL ,
     EFFECTFLAG VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     SUBMITTIME TIMESTAMP NULL,
     EDITTIME TIMESTAMP NULL,
     CREATEDBYID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYNAME VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
     CREATEDTIME TIMESTAMP NULL,
     CREATEDBYORGID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYORGNAME VARCHAR(270)  NULL,
      PRIMARY KEY (ID)
);
comment on table T_LCDP_RESOURCE_VERSION is '低代码平台资源版本表';
comment on column T_LCDP_RESOURCE_VERSION.id is '主键';
comment on column T_LCDP_RESOURCE_VERSION.resourceId is '资源ID(对于表是表名tableName,对于资源是资源ID resourceId)';
comment on column T_LCDP_RESOURCE_VERSION.resourceName is '资源名称';
comment on column T_LCDP_RESOURCE_VERSION.resourceCategory is '资源类型';
comment on column T_LCDP_RESOURCE_VERSION.version is '版本';
comment on column T_LCDP_RESOURCE_VERSION.commit is '提交日志';
comment on column T_LCDP_RESOURCE_VERSION.effectFlag is '是否生效';
comment on column T_LCDP_RESOURCE_VERSION.submitTime is '提交时间';
comment on column T_LCDP_RESOURCE_VERSION.editTime is '开始编辑时间';
comment on column T_LCDP_RESOURCE_VERSION.createdById is '制单人编码';
comment on column T_LCDP_RESOURCE_VERSION.createdByName is '制单人名称';
comment on column T_LCDP_RESOURCE_VERSION.createdTime is '制单时间';
comment on column T_LCDP_RESOURCE_VERSION.createdByOrgId is '制单人单位编码';
comment on column T_LCDP_RESOURCE_VERSION.createdByOrgName is '制单人单位名称';
CREATE INDEX IDX_LCDP_RESOURCE_VERSION_RESOURCEID ON T_LCDP_RESOURCE_VERSION (RESOURCEID);

-- 建表语句

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS T_LCDP_BIZ_PROCESS(
     ID BIGINT NOT NULL,
     BPCODE VARCHAR(30)  NULL ,
     BPNAME VARCHAR(120)  NULL ,
     BPDESC VARCHAR(300)  NULL ,
     RESOURCEID BIGINT NULL,
     RESOURCENAME VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
     TABLENAME VARCHAR(150)  NULL ,
     ACTIVATEDFLAG VARCHAR(1)  NULL ,
     ACTIVATEDBYID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     ACTIVATEDBYNAME VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
     ACTIVATEDTIME TIMESTAMP NULL,
     VERSION BIGINT NULL,
     CREATEDBYID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYNAME VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
     CREATEDTIME TIMESTAMP NULL,
     CREATEDBYORGID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYORGNAME VARCHAR(270)  NULL,
      PRIMARY KEY (ID)
);
comment on table T_LCDP_BIZ_PROCESS is '工作流';
comment on column T_LCDP_BIZ_PROCESS.id is '主键ID';
comment on column T_LCDP_BIZ_PROCESS.bpCode is '工作流编码';
comment on column T_LCDP_BIZ_PROCESS.bpName is '工作流名称';
comment on column T_LCDP_BIZ_PROCESS.bpDesc is '工作流描述';
comment on column T_LCDP_BIZ_PROCESS.resourceId is '绑定页面ID';
comment on column T_LCDP_BIZ_PROCESS.resourceName is '绑定页面名称';
comment on column T_LCDP_BIZ_PROCESS.tableName is '绑定表名称';
comment on column T_LCDP_BIZ_PROCESS.activatedFlag is '启用标志';
comment on column T_LCDP_BIZ_PROCESS.activatedById is '启用/停用人编码';
comment on column T_LCDP_BIZ_PROCESS.activatedByName is '启用/停用人名称';
comment on column T_LCDP_BIZ_PROCESS.activatedTime is '启用/停用时间';
comment on column T_LCDP_BIZ_PROCESS.version is '版本号';
comment on column T_LCDP_BIZ_PROCESS.createdById is '制单人编码';
comment on column T_LCDP_BIZ_PROCESS.createdByName is '制单人名称';
comment on column T_LCDP_BIZ_PROCESS.createdTime is '制单时间';
comment on column T_LCDP_BIZ_PROCESS.createdByOrgId is '制单人单位编码';
comment on column T_LCDP_BIZ_PROCESS.createdByOrgName is '制单人单位名称';


CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS T_LCDP_BIZ_PROCESS_NODE(
     ID BIGINT NOT NULL,
     BPID BIGINT NULL,
     BPNODECODE VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     BPNODENAME VARCHAR(120)  NULL ,
     BPNODEDESC VARCHAR(360)  NULL ,
     ORDERNO BIGINT NULL,
     ELECSIGNFLAG VARCHAR(1)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYNAME VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
     CREATEDTIME TIMESTAMP NULL,
     CREATEDBYORGID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYORGNAME VARCHAR(270)  NULL,
      PRIMARY KEY (ID)
);

comment on column T_LCDP_BIZ_PROCESS_NODE.bpNodeDesc is '流程节点描述';

comment on column T_LCDP_BIZ_PROCESS_NODE.elecSignFlag is '是否电子签名';
comment on column T_LCDP_BIZ_PROCESS_NODE.createdById is '制单人编码';
comment on column T_LCDP_BIZ_PROCESS_NODE.createdByName is '制单人名称';
comment on column T_LCDP_BIZ_PROCESS_NODE.createdTime is '制单时间';
comment on column T_LCDP_BIZ_PROCESS_NODE.createdByOrgId is '制单人单位编码';
comment on column T_LCDP_BIZ_PROCESS_NODE.createdByOrgName is '制单人单位名称';
CREATE INDEX IDX_LBPN_BPID ON T_LCDP_BIZ_PROCESS_NODE (BPID);

-- ----------------------------- 2022-10-27 add by yangshuzhi------------begin
-- 建表语句

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS T_LCDP_TABLE(
     ID BIGINT NOT NULL,
     TABLENAME VARCHAR(60)  NOT NULL ,
     TABLEDESC VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
     VERSION BIGINT NULL,
     SQL TEXT NULL,
     SUBMITFLAG VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYNAME VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
     CREATEDTIME DATE  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYORGID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYORGNAME VARCHAR(270)  NULL,
      PRIMARY KEY (ID)
);
comment on table T_LCDP_TABLE is '低代码平台表';
comment on column T_LCDP_TABLE.id is '主键';
comment on column T_LCDP_TABLE.tableName is '表名';
comment on column T_LCDP_TABLE.tableDesc is '表注释';
comment on column T_LCDP_TABLE.version is '版本';
comment on column T_LCDP_TABLE.SQL is 'SQL';
comment on column T_LCDP_TABLE.submitFlag is '是否提交';
comment on column T_LCDP_TABLE.createdById is '制单人编码';
comment on column T_LCDP_TABLE.createdByName is '制单人名称';
comment on column T_LCDP_TABLE.createdTime is '制单时间';
comment on column T_LCDP_TABLE.createdByOrgId is '制单人单位编码';
comment on column T_LCDP_TABLE.createdByOrgName is '制单人单位名称';


CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS T_LCDP_TABLE_FIELD(
     ID BIGINT NOT NULL,
     TABLEID BIGINT NULL,
     FIELDNAME VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
     FIELDCOMMENT VARCHAR(120)  NULL ,
     FIELDTYPE VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     FIELDLENGTH VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     ALLOWNULL VARCHAR(1)  NULL ,
     DEFAULTVALUE VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
     FIELDOPERATIONTYPE VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYNAME VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
     CREATEDTIME DATE NULL,
     CREATEDBYORGID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYORGNAME VARCHAR(270)  NULL,
      PRIMARY KEY (ID)
);
comment on table T_LCDP_TABLE_FIELD is '低代码平台表字段';
comment on column T_LCDP_TABLE_FIELD.id is '主键';
comment on column T_LCDP_TABLE_FIELD.tableId is '表ID';
comment on column T_LCDP_TABLE_FIELD.fieldName is '字段名';
comment on column T_LCDP_TABLE_FIELD.fieldComment is '字段注释';
comment on column T_LCDP_TABLE_FIELD.fieldType is '字段类型';
comment on column T_LCDP_TABLE_FIELD.fieldLength is '字段长度';
comment on column T_LCDP_TABLE_FIELD.allowNull is '是否可为空';
comment on column T_LCDP_TABLE_FIELD.defaultValue is '默认值';
comment on column T_LCDP_TABLE_FIELD.fieldOperationType is '字段操作类型(add、delete、update)';
comment on column T_LCDP_TABLE_FIELD.createdById is '制单人编码';
comment on column T_LCDP_TABLE_FIELD.createdByName is '制单人名称';
comment on column T_LCDP_TABLE_FIELD.createdTime is '制单时间';
comment on column T_LCDP_TABLE_FIELD.createdByOrgId is '制单人单位编码';
comment on column T_LCDP_TABLE_FIELD.createdByOrgName is '制单人单位名称';
CREATE INDEX IDX_LCDP_TABLE_FIELD_TABLEID ON T_LCDP_TABLE_FIELD (TABLEID);


CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS T_LCDP_TABLE_INDEX(
     ID BIGINT NOT NULL,
     TABLEID BIGINT NULL,
     INDEXNAME VARCHAR(120)  NULL ,
     INDEXTYPE VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     INDEXFIELD VARCHAR(120)  NULL ,
     INDEXOPERATIONTYPE VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYNAME VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
     CREATEDTIME DATE NULL,
     CREATEDBYORGID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYORGNAME VARCHAR(270)  NULL,
      PRIMARY KEY (ID)
);
comment on table T_LCDP_TABLE_INDEX is '低代码平台表索引';
comment on column T_LCDP_TABLE_INDEX.id is '主键';
comment on column T_LCDP_TABLE_INDEX.tableId is '表ID';
comment on column T_LCDP_TABLE_INDEX.indexName is '索引名';
comment on column T_LCDP_TABLE_INDEX.indexType is '索引类型';
comment on column T_LCDP_TABLE_INDEX.indexField is '索引字段';
comment on column T_LCDP_TABLE_INDEX.indexOperationType is '索引操作类型(add、delete、update)';
comment on column T_LCDP_TABLE_INDEX.createdById is '制单人编码';
comment on column T_LCDP_TABLE_INDEX.createdByName is '制单人名称';
comment on column T_LCDP_TABLE_INDEX.createdTime is '制单时间';
comment on column T_LCDP_TABLE_INDEX.createdByOrgId is '制单人单位编码';
comment on column T_LCDP_TABLE_INDEX.createdByOrgName is '制单人单位名称';
CREATE INDEX IDX_LCDP_TABLE_INDEX_TABLEID ON T_LCDP_TABLE_INDEX (TABLEID);

     ID BIGINT NOT NULL,

     EXPORTLOG VARCHAR(180)  NULL ,

     CREATEDTIME TIMESTAMP NULL,

);

-- 文件操作系统脚本
INSERT INTO T_LCDP_SERVER_SCRIPT_METHOD (ID,RESOURCEID,PATH) VALUES (NEXTVAL('SEQ_CORE'),1,'lcdp.file.server.FileScript.delete');
INSERT INTO T_LCDP_SERVER_SCRIPT_METHOD (ID,RESOURCEID,PATH) VALUES (NEXTVAL('SEQ_CORE'),1,'lcdp.file.server.FileScript.upload');
INSERT INTO T_LCDP_SERVER_SCRIPT_METHOD (ID,RESOURCEID,PATH) VALUES (NEXTVAL('SEQ_CORE'),1,'lcdp.file.server.FileScript.selectPagination');
INSERT INTO T_LCDP_RESOURCE (ID,RESOURCENAME,RESOURCEDESC,RESOURCECATEGORY,PARENTID,ORDERNO,CONTENT,EFFECTVERSION,PATH,CREATEDBYID,CREATEDBYNAME,CREATEDTIME,CREATEDBYORGID,CREATEDBYORGNAME) VALUES (1,'FileScript','文件操作系统脚本','java',0,1,'import com.sunwayworld.framework.context.ApplicationContextHelper;
import com.sunwayworld.framework.data.page.Page;
import com.sunwayworld.framework.restful.data.RestJsonWrapperBean;
import com.sunwayworld.module.item.file.bean.CoreFileBean;
import com.sunwayworld.module.item.file.service.CoreFileService;
import org.springframework.web.multipart.MultipartFile;
import com.sunwayworld.cloud.module.lcdp.base.LcdpResultDTO;
import com.sunwayworld.cloud.module.lcdp.support.constant.LcdpConstant;


public class FileScript{


    /**
     * 查询附件数据
     *
     * @param wrapper
     */
    public Page<CoreFileBean> selectPagination(RestJsonWrapperBean wrapper) {

        Page<CoreFileBean> filePage = ApplicationContextHelper.getBean(CoreFileService.class).selectSearchablePagination(wrapper);

        return filePage;
    }

    /**
     * 上传附件
     */
    public Long upload(CoreFileBean coreFile, MultipartFile file) {

        Long fileId = ApplicationContextHelper.getBean(CoreFileService.class).upload(coreFile, file);

        return fileId;
    }

    /**
     * 删除附件
     */
    public LcdpResultDTO delete(RestJsonWrapperBean wrapper) {
        ApplicationContextHelper.getBean(CoreFileService.class).delete(wrapper);
        return new LcdpResultDTO(LcdpConstant.RESULT_CODE_SUCCESS, LcdpConstant.RESULT_MESSAGE_SUCCESS);
    }
}',1,'lcdp.file.server.FileScript',null,null,null,null,null);


COMMIT;

-- 建表语句

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS T_LCDP_MODULE_TMPL(
     ID BIGINT NOT NULL,
     MODULETMPLNAME VARCHAR(120)  NULL,
      PRIMARY KEY (ID)
);
comment on table T_LCDP_MODULE_TMPL is '模块模板';
comment on column T_LCDP_MODULE_TMPL.id is '主键';
comment on column T_LCDP_MODULE_TMPL.moduleTmplName is '模板名称';


CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS T_LCDP_MODULE_TMPL_RESOURCE(
     ID BIGINT NOT NULL,
     MODULETMPLCONFIGID BIGINT NOT NULL,
     RESOURCECATEGORY VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CONTENT TEXT NULL,
     PAGETYPE VARCHAR(36)  NULL,
      PRIMARY KEY (ID)
);
comment on table T_LCDP_MODULE_TMPL_RESOURCE is '模块模板资源';
comment on column T_LCDP_MODULE_TMPL_RESOURCE.id is '主键';
comment on column T_LCDP_MODULE_TMPL_RESOURCE.moduleTmplConfigId is '模块模板配置ID';
comment on column T_LCDP_MODULE_TMPL_RESOURCE.resourceCategory is '资源类型页面、前端脚本、后端脚本';
comment on column T_LCDP_MODULE_TMPL_RESOURCE.content is '内容';
comment on column T_LCDP_MODULE_TMPL_RESOURCE.pageType is '页面类型';
CREATE INDEX IDX_LCDP_MODULE_TMPL_RESOURCE_MODULETMPLCONFIGID ON T_LCDP_MODULE_TMPL_RESOURCE (MODULETMPLCONFIGID);


CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS T_LCDP_MODULE_TMPL_PAGE_COMP(
     ID VARCHAR(36)  NOT NULL ,
     MODULETMPLPAGEID BIGINT NULL,
     COMPID VARCHAR(18)  NULL ,
     TYPE VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     PARENTID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     PREVIOUSID BIGINT NULL,
     VISIBLE VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     EDITABLE VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CONFIG VARCHAR(4000)  NULL ,
     CONFIGEXTEND VARCHAR(4000)  NULL ,
     COMPTAG VARCHAR(36)  NULL,
      PRIMARY KEY (ID)
);
comment on table T_LCDP_MODULE_TMPL_PAGE_COMP is '模块模板页面组件表';
comment on column T_LCDP_MODULE_TMPL_PAGE_COMP.id is '主键';
comment on column T_LCDP_MODULE_TMPL_PAGE_COMP.moduleTmplPageId is '模块模板页面ID';
comment on column T_LCDP_MODULE_TMPL_PAGE_COMP.compId is '组件ID';
comment on column T_LCDP_MODULE_TMPL_PAGE_COMP.type is '组件类型';
comment on column T_LCDP_MODULE_TMPL_PAGE_COMP.parentId is '父组件ID';
comment on column T_LCDP_MODULE_TMPL_PAGE_COMP.previousId is '前一组件id';
comment on column T_LCDP_MODULE_TMPL_PAGE_COMP.visible is '是否可见';
comment on column T_LCDP_MODULE_TMPL_PAGE_COMP.editable is '是否可编辑';
comment on column T_LCDP_MODULE_TMPL_PAGE_COMP.config is '组件配置';
comment on column T_LCDP_MODULE_TMPL_PAGE_COMP.configExtend is '组件配置扩展';
comment on column T_LCDP_MODULE_TMPL_PAGE_COMP.compTag is '页面组件标记 记录组件作用';
CREATE INDEX IDX_LCDP_MODULE_TMPL_PAGE_COMP_MODULETMPLPAGEID ON T_LCDP_MODULE_TMPL_PAGE_COMP (MODULETMPLPAGEID);


CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS T_LCDP_MODULE_TMPL_CONFIG(
     ID BIGINT NOT NULL,
     MODULETMPLID BIGINT NULL,
     BPFLAG VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     UPLOADERFLAG VARCHAR(36)  NULL,
      PRIMARY KEY (ID)
);
comment on table T_LCDP_MODULE_TMPL_CONFIG is '模板配置表';
comment on column T_LCDP_MODULE_TMPL_CONFIG.id is '主键';
comment on column T_LCDP_MODULE_TMPL_CONFIG.moduleTmplId is '模块模板ID';
comment on column T_LCDP_MODULE_TMPL_CONFIG.bpFlag is '是否带工作流';
comment on column T_LCDP_MODULE_TMPL_CONFIG.uploaderFlag is '是否带附件';
CREATE INDEX IDX_LCDP_MODULE_TMPL_CONFIG_MODULETMPLID ON T_LCDP_MODULE_TMPL_CONFIG (MODULETMPLID);

CALL INSERTI18N('T_LCDP_MODULE_TMPL.SERVICE_NAME', '模块模板', '模块模板', 'zh-CN', '模块模板');
CALL INSERTI18N('T_LCDP_MODULE_TMPL.ID', '模块模板的主键', '主键', 'zh-CN', '主键');
CALL INSERTI18N('T_LCDP_MODULE_TMPL.MODULETMPLNAME', '模块模板的模板名称', '模板名称', 'zh-CN', '模板名称');
CALL INSERTI18N('T_LCDP_MODULE_TMPL_RESOURCE.SERVICE_NAME', '模块模板资源', '模块模板资源', 'zh-CN', '模块模板资源');

COMMENT ON COLUMN T_LCDP_SERVER_SCRIPT_METHOD.METHODNAME IS '方法名称';
ALTER TABLE T_LCDP_SERVER_SCRIPT_METHOD ADD METHODPATH VARCHAR(120) NULL;
COMMENT ON COLUMN T_LCDP_SERVER_SCRIPT_METHOD.METHODPATH IS '方法路径';
ALTER TABLE T_LCDP_SERVER_SCRIPT_METHOD ADD SERVERSCRIPTID BIGINT NULL;
COMMENT ON COLUMN T_LCDP_SERVER_SCRIPT_METHOD.SERVERSCRIPTID IS '服务端脚本ID';
UPDATE T_LCDP_SERVER_SCRIPT_METHOD SET METHODPATH = "path"  ;

UPDATE T_LCDP_SERVER_SCRIPT_METHOD SET SERVERSCRIPTID = RESOURCEID ;

alter table T_LCDP_SERVER_SCRIPT_METHOD drop column PATH;
alter table T_LCDP_SERVER_SCRIPT_METHOD drop column RESOURCEID;

-- ----------------------------- 2022-12-29 add by liuxia------------begin
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS T_LCDP_CUSTOM_TMPL_RESOURCE(
     ID BIGINT NOT NULL,
     MODULETMPLID BIGINT NULL,
     RESOURCENAME VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
     RESOURCEDESC VARCHAR(180)  NULL ,
     RESOURCECATEGORY VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     PARENTID BIGINT NULL,
     ORDERNO BIGINT NULL,
     CONTENT TEXT NULL,
     EFFECTVERSION BIGINT NULL,
     PATH VARCHAR(360)  NULL ,
     CLASSNAME VARCHAR(60)  NULL,
      PRIMARY KEY (ID)
);
comment on table T_LCDP_CUSTOM_TMPL_RESOURCE is '自定义模板资源表';
comment on column T_LCDP_CUSTOM_TMPL_RESOURCE.id is '主键';
comment on column T_LCDP_CUSTOM_TMPL_RESOURCE.moduleTmplId is '模块模板ID';
comment on column T_LCDP_CUSTOM_TMPL_RESOURCE.resourceName is '资源名称';
comment on column T_LCDP_CUSTOM_TMPL_RESOURCE.resourceDesc is '资源描述';
comment on column T_LCDP_CUSTOM_TMPL_RESOURCE.resourceCategory is '资源类型';
comment on column T_LCDP_CUSTOM_TMPL_RESOURCE.parentId is '父ID';
comment on column T_LCDP_CUSTOM_TMPL_RESOURCE.orderNo is '排序码';
comment on column T_LCDP_CUSTOM_TMPL_RESOURCE.content is '内容';
comment on column T_LCDP_CUSTOM_TMPL_RESOURCE.effectVersion is '生效版本';
comment on column T_LCDP_CUSTOM_TMPL_RESOURCE.path is '资源路径';
comment on column T_LCDP_CUSTOM_TMPL_RESOURCE.className is '类名';
CREATE INDEX IDX_LCDP_CUSTOM_TMPL_RESOURCE_MODULETMPLID ON T_LCDP_CUSTOM_TMPL_RESOURCE (MODULETMPLID);


CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS T_LCDP_CUSTOM_TMPL_PAGE_COMP(
     ID VARCHAR(36)  NOT NULL ,
     CUSTOMTMPLPAGEID BIGINT NULL,
     COMPID VARCHAR(18)  NULL ,
     TYPE VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     PARENTID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     PREVIOUSID BIGINT NULL,
     VISIBLE VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     EDITABLE VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CONFIG VARCHAR(4000)  NULL ,
     CONFIGEXTEND VARCHAR(4000)  NULL,
      PRIMARY KEY (ID)
);
comment on table T_LCDP_CUSTOM_TMPL_PAGE_COMP is '自定义模板页面组件表';
comment on column T_LCDP_CUSTOM_TMPL_PAGE_COMP.id is '主键';
comment on column T_LCDP_CUSTOM_TMPL_PAGE_COMP.customTmplPageId is '自定义模块模板页面ID';
comment on column T_LCDP_CUSTOM_TMPL_PAGE_COMP.compId is '组件ID';
comment on column T_LCDP_CUSTOM_TMPL_PAGE_COMP.type is '组件类型';
comment on column T_LCDP_CUSTOM_TMPL_PAGE_COMP.parentId is '父组件ID';
comment on column T_LCDP_CUSTOM_TMPL_PAGE_COMP.previousId is '前一组件id';
comment on column T_LCDP_CUSTOM_TMPL_PAGE_COMP.visible is '是否可见';
comment on column T_LCDP_CUSTOM_TMPL_PAGE_COMP.editable is '是否可编辑';
comment on column T_LCDP_CUSTOM_TMPL_PAGE_COMP.config is '组件配置';
comment on column T_LCDP_CUSTOM_TMPL_PAGE_COMP.configExtend is '组件配置扩展';
CREATE INDEX IDX_LCDP_CUSTOM_TMPL_PAGE_COMP_CUSTOMTMPLPAGEID ON T_LCDP_CUSTOM_TMPL_PAGE_COMP (CUSTOMTMPLPAGEID);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS T_LCDP_BP_INST(
     ID BIGINT NOT NULL,
     BPID BIGINT NULL,
     BPCODE VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     TABLENAME VARCHAR(120)  NULL ,
     BIZID BIGINT NULL,
     SUBMITUSERID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYNAME VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
     CREATEDTIME TIMESTAMP NULL,
     CREATEDBYORGID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYORGNAME VARCHAR(270)  NULL,
      PRIMARY KEY (ID)
);
comment on table T_LCDP_BP_INST is '工作流实例';
comment on column T_LCDP_BP_INST.id is '主键';
comment on column T_LCDP_BP_INST.bpId is '工作流id';
comment on column T_LCDP_BP_INST.bpCode is '工作流编码';
comment on column T_LCDP_BP_INST.tableName is '业务表名';
comment on column T_LCDP_BP_INST.bizId is '业务主键id';
comment on column T_LCDP_BP_INST.submitUserId is '提交人编码';
comment on column T_LCDP_BP_INST.createdById is '制单人编码';
comment on column T_LCDP_BP_INST.createdByName is '制单人名称';
comment on column T_LCDP_BP_INST.createdTime is '制单时间';
comment on column T_LCDP_BP_INST.createdByOrgId is '制单人单位编码';
comment on column T_LCDP_BP_INST.createdByOrgName is '制单人单位名称';
CREATE INDEX IDX_LCDP_BP_INST_BPID ON T_LCDP_BP_INST (BPID);


CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS T_LCDP_BP_INST_NODE(
     ID BIGINT NOT NULL,
     BPINSTID BIGINT NULL,
     BPNODEID BIGINT NULL,
     BPNODECODE VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     STATUS VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYNAME VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
     CREATEDTIME TIMESTAMP NULL,
     CREATEDBYORGID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYORGNAME VARCHAR(270)  NULL,
      PRIMARY KEY (ID)
);

comment on column T_LCDP_BP_INST_NODE.bpInstId is '工作流实例id';

comment on column T_LCDP_BP_INST_NODE.status is '节点状态';
comment on column T_LCDP_BP_INST_NODE.createdById is '制单人编码';
comment on column T_LCDP_BP_INST_NODE.createdByName is '制单人名称';
comment on column T_LCDP_BP_INST_NODE.createdTime is '制单时间';
comment on column T_LCDP_BP_INST_NODE.createdByOrgId is '制单人单位编码';
comment on column T_LCDP_BP_INST_NODE.createdByOrgName is '制单人单位名称';
CREATE INDEX IDX_LCDP_BP_INST_NODE_BPINSTID ON T_LCDP_BP_INST_NODE (BPINSTID);

-- ----------------------------- 2023-02-10 add by liuxia------------begin
-- 建表语句

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS T_CORE_SEQUENCE_LINE(
     ID BIGINT NOT NULL,
     SEQUENCEID VARCHAR(64)  NULL ,
     SEQUENCECODECATEGORY VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     SEQUENCECODE VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
     ORDERNO BIGINT NULL,
     CREATEDBYID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYNAME VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
     CREATEDTIME TIMESTAMP NULL,
     CREATEDBYORGID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYORGNAME VARCHAR(270)  NULL,
      PRIMARY KEY (ID)
);
comment on table T_CORE_SEQUENCE_LINE is '编号规则明细';
comment on column T_CORE_SEQUENCE_LINE.id is '主键';
comment on column T_CORE_SEQUENCE_LINE.sequenceId is 'sequenceId';
comment on column T_CORE_SEQUENCE_LINE.sequenceCodeCategory is '编号类型';
comment on column T_CORE_SEQUENCE_LINE.sequenceCode is '编号';
comment on column T_CORE_SEQUENCE_LINE.orderNo is '排序号';
comment on column T_CORE_SEQUENCE_LINE.createdById is '制单人编码';
comment on column T_CORE_SEQUENCE_LINE.createdByName is '制单人名称';
comment on column T_CORE_SEQUENCE_LINE.createdTime is '制单时间';
comment on column T_CORE_SEQUENCE_LINE.createdByOrgId is '制单人单位编码';
comment on column T_CORE_SEQUENCE_LINE.createdByOrgName is '制单人单位名称';

CALL INSERTI18N('T_CORE_SEQUENCE_LINE.SERVICE_NAME', '编号规则明细', '编号规则明细', 'zh-CN', '编号规则明细');
CALL INSERTI18N('T_CORE_SEQUENCE_LINE.ID', '编号规则明细的主键', '主键', 'zh-CN', '主键');
CALL INSERTI18N('T_CORE_SEQUENCE_LINE.SEQUENCEID', '编号规则明细的sequenceId', 'sequenceId', 'zh-CN', 'sequenceId');
CALL INSERTI18N('T_CORE_SEQUENCE_LINE.SEQUENCECODECATEGORY', '编号规则明细的编号类型', '编号类型', 'zh-CN', '编号类型');
CALL INSERTI18N('T_CORE_SEQUENCE_LINE.SEQUENCECODE', '编号规则明细的编号', '编号', 'zh-CN', '编号');
CALL INSERTI18N('T_CORE_SEQUENCE_LINE.ORDERNO', '编号规则明细的排序号', '排序号', 'zh-CN', '排序号');
CALL INSERTI18N('T_CORE_SEQUENCE_LINE.CREATEDBYID', '编号规则明细的制单人编码', '制单人编码', 'zh-CN', '制单人编码');
CALL INSERTI18N('T_CORE_SEQUENCE_LINE.CREATEDBYNAME', '编号规则明细的制单人名称', '制单人名称', 'zh-CN', '制单人名称');
CALL INSERTI18N('T_CORE_SEQUENCE_LINE.CREATEDTIME', '编号规则明细的制单时间', '制单时间', 'zh-CN', '制单时间');
CALL INSERTI18N('T_CORE_SEQUENCE_LINE.CREATEDBYORGID', '编号规则明细的制单人单位编码', '制单人单位编码', 'zh-CN', '制单人单位编码');
CALL INSERTI18N('T_CORE_SEQUENCE_LINE.CREATEDBYORGNAME', '编号规则明细的制单人单位名称', '制单人单位名称', 'zh-CN', '制单人单位名称');


INSERT INTO T_CORE_TABLE (ID, AUDITABLE, ATTACHMENT)
VALUES ('T_CORE_SEQUENCE_LINE', '0', '0');

COMMIT;

-- 建表语句

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS T_LCDP_GLOBAL_CONFIG(
     ID VARCHAR(36)  NOT NULL ,
     CONFIGCONTENT TEXT NULL,
      PRIMARY KEY (ID)
);
COMMENT ON TABLE T_LCDP_GLOBAL_CONFIG IS '低代码系统全局配置';
COMMENT ON COLUMN T_LCDP_GLOBAL_CONFIG.ID IS '主键';
COMMENT ON COLUMN T_LCDP_GLOBAL_CONFIG.CONFIGCONTENT IS '配置内容';

CALL INSERTI18N('T_LCDP_GLOBAL_CONFIG.SERVICE_NAME', '低代码系统全局配置', '低代码系统全局配置', 'zh-CN', '低代码系统全局配置');
CALL INSERTI18N('T_LCDP_GLOBAL_CONFIG.ID', '低代码系统全局配置的主键', '主键', 'zh-CN', '主键');
CALL INSERTI18N('T_LCDP_GLOBAL_CONFIG.CONFIGCONTENT', '低代码系统全局配置的配置内容', '配置内容', 'zh-CN', '配置内容');

INSERT INTO T_CORE_TABLE (ID, AUDITABLE, ATTACHMENT)
VALUES ('T_LCDP_GLOBAL_CONFIG', '0', '0');

-- 初始化全局脚本数据
INSERT INTO T_LCDP_GLOBAL_CONFIG (ID)
	VALUES ('SYS_CLIENT_JS');

COMMIT;

-- 建表语句

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS T_LCDP_SCRIPT_BLOCK(
     ID BIGINT NOT NULL,
     NAME VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
     CATEGORY VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     PARENTID BIGINT NULL,
     CONTENT VARCHAR(3000)  NULL ,
     ORDERNO BIGINT NULL,
     CREATEDBYID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYNAME VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
     CREATEDTIME TIMESTAMP NULL,
     CREATEDBYORGID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYORGNAME VARCHAR(270)  NULL,
      PRIMARY KEY (ID)
);
comment on table T_LCDP_SCRIPT_BLOCK is '脚本代码块表';
comment on column T_LCDP_SCRIPT_BLOCK.id is '主键';
comment on column T_LCDP_SCRIPT_BLOCK.name is '名称';
comment on column T_LCDP_SCRIPT_BLOCK.category is '脚本代码块类型';
comment on column T_LCDP_SCRIPT_BLOCK.parentId is '父ID';
comment on column T_LCDP_SCRIPT_BLOCK.content is '代码块内容';
comment on column T_LCDP_SCRIPT_BLOCK.orderNo is '排序码';
comment on column T_LCDP_SCRIPT_BLOCK.createdById is '制单人编码';
comment on column T_LCDP_SCRIPT_BLOCK.createdByName is '制单人名称';
comment on column T_LCDP_SCRIPT_BLOCK.createdTime is '制单时间';
comment on column T_LCDP_SCRIPT_BLOCK.createdByOrgId is '制单人单位编码';
comment on column T_LCDP_SCRIPT_BLOCK.createdByOrgName is '制单人单位名称';

CALL INSERTI18N('T_LCDP_SCRIPT_BLOCK.SERVICE_NAME', '脚本代码块表', '脚本代码块表', 'zh-CN', '脚本代码块表');
CALL INSERTI18N('T_LCDP_SCRIPT_BLOCK.ID', '脚本代码块表的主键', '主键', 'zh-CN', '主键');
CALL INSERTI18N('T_LCDP_SCRIPT_BLOCK.NAME', '脚本代码块表的名称', '名称', 'zh-CN', '名称');
CALL INSERTI18N('T_LCDP_SCRIPT_BLOCK.CATEGORY', '脚本代码块表的脚本代码块类型', '脚本代码块类型', 'zh-CN', '脚本代码块类型');
CALL INSERTI18N('T_LCDP_SCRIPT_BLOCK.PARENTID', '脚本代码块表的父ID', '父ID', 'zh-CN', '父ID');
CALL INSERTI18N('T_LCDP_SCRIPT_BLOCK.CONTENT', '脚本代码块表的代码块内容', '代码块内容', 'zh-CN', '代码块内容');
CALL INSERTI18N('T_LCDP_SCRIPT_BLOCK.ORDERNO', '脚本代码块表的排序码', '排序码', 'zh-CN', '排序码');
CALL INSERTI18N('T_LCDP_SCRIPT_BLOCK.CREATEDBYID', '脚本代码块表的制单人编码', '制单人编码', 'zh-CN', '制单人编码');
CALL INSERTI18N('T_LCDP_SCRIPT_BLOCK.CREATEDBYNAME', '脚本代码块表的制单人名称', '制单人名称', 'zh-CN', '制单人名称');
CALL INSERTI18N('T_LCDP_SCRIPT_BLOCK.CREATEDTIME', '脚本代码块表的制单时间', '制单时间', 'zh-CN', '制单时间');
CALL INSERTI18N('T_LCDP_SCRIPT_BLOCK.CREATEDBYORGID', '脚本代码块表的制单人单位编码', '制单人单位编码', 'zh-CN', '制单人单位编码');
CALL INSERTI18N('T_LCDP_SCRIPT_BLOCK.CREATEDBYORGNAME', '脚本代码块表的制单人单位名称', '制单人单位名称', 'zh-CN', '制单人单位名称');


INSERT INTO T_CORE_TABLE (ID, AUDITABLE, ATTACHMENT)
VALUES ('T_LCDP_SCRIPT_BLOCK', '0', '0');


COMMIT;

-- ----------------------------- 2023-03-01 add by liuxia------------begin
UPDATE T_LCDP_RESOURCE SET CONTENT ='import com.sunwayworld.framework.context.ApplicationContextHelper;
import com.sunwayworld.framework.data.page.Page;
import com.sunwayworld.framework.data.page.Pagination;
import com.sunwayworld.framework.restful.data.RestJsonWrapperBean;
import com.sunwayworld.module.item.file.bean.CoreFileBean;
import com.sunwayworld.module.item.file.service.CoreFileService;
import org.springframework.web.multipart.MultipartFile;
import com.sunwayworld.cloud.module.lcdp.base.LcdpResultDTO;
import com.sunwayworld.cloud.module.lcdp.support.constant.LcdpConstant;

import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;

import java.util.*;
import com.sunwayworld.framework.utils.*;

public class FileScript {
     /**
     *
     * @param wrapper
     */

    public Page<Map<String, Object>> selectPagination(RestJsonWrapperBean wrapper) {

        Page<CoreFileBean> filePage = ApplicationContextHelper.getBean(CoreFileService.class).selectSearchablePagination(wrapper);
		List<CoreFileBean> rows = filePage.getRows();
		List<Map<String,Object>> mapList = new ArrayList<>();
		for (Object row : rows) {
			  Map<String, Object> map = BeanUtils.toMap(row);
                map.forEach((column, value) -> {
                    if (column != null) {
                        // 对于日期和时间，date结尾的只保留年月日，time结尾的保留时分秒
                        if (StringUtils.endsWithIgnoreCase(column, "date")) {
                            try {
                                value = DateTimeUtils.formatLocalDate(DateTimeUtils.parseLocalDate(value.toString()));
                                map.put(column,value);
                            } catch (Exception ex) {
                            };
                        } else if (StringUtils.endsWithIgnoreCase(column, "time")) {
                            try {
                                value = DateTimeUtils.formatLocalDateTime(DateTimeUtils.parseLocalDateTime(value.toString()));
                                map.put(column,value);
                            } catch (Exception ex) {
                            };
                        }
                    }
                });
			mapList.add(map);
		}

         return new Pagination<>(filePage.getTotal(), filePage.getPageSize(), filePage.getPageNumber(), mapList);
    }

    /**
     * 上传附件
     */
    public Long upload(CoreFileBean coreFile, MultipartFile file) {

        Long fileId = ApplicationContextHelper.getBean(CoreFileService.class).upload(coreFile, file);

        return fileId;
    }

    /**
     * 删除附件
     */
    public LcdpResultDTO delete(RestJsonWrapperBean wrapper) {
        ApplicationContextHelper.getBean(CoreFileService.class).delete(wrapper);
        return new LcdpResultDTO(LcdpConstant.RESULT_CODE_SUCCESS, LcdpConstant.RESULT_MESSAGE_SUCCESS);
    }
}' WHERE ID = 1;

UPDATE T_LCDP_RESOURCE SET CLASSCONTENT  ='import com.sunwayworld.framework.context.ApplicationContextHelper;
import com.sunwayworld.framework.data.page.Page;
import com.sunwayworld.framework.data.page.Pagination;
import com.sunwayworld.framework.restful.data.RestJsonWrapperBean;
import com.sunwayworld.module.item.file.bean.CoreFileBean;
import com.sunwayworld.module.item.file.service.CoreFileService;
import org.springframework.web.multipart.MultipartFile;
import com.sunwayworld.cloud.module.lcdp.base.LcdpResultDTO;
import com.sunwayworld.cloud.module.lcdp.support.constant.LcdpConstant;

import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;

import java.util.*;
import com.sunwayworld.framework.utils.*;

public class FileScript {
     /**
     *
     * @param wrapper
     */

    public Page<Map<String, Object>> selectPagination(RestJsonWrapperBean wrapper) {

        Page<CoreFileBean> filePage = ApplicationContextHelper.getBean(CoreFileService.class).selectSearchablePagination(wrapper);
		List<CoreFileBean> rows = filePage.getRows();
		List<Map<String,Object>> mapList = new ArrayList<>();
		for (Object row : rows) {
			  Map<String, Object> map = BeanUtils.toMap(row);
                map.forEach((column, value) -> {
                    if (column != null) {
                        // 对于日期和时间，date结尾的只保留年月日，time结尾的保留时分秒
                        if (StringUtils.endsWithIgnoreCase(column, "date")) {
                            try {
                                value = DateTimeUtils.formatLocalDate(DateTimeUtils.parseLocalDate(value.toString()));
                                map.put(column,value);
                            } catch (Exception ex) {
                            };
                        } else if (StringUtils.endsWithIgnoreCase(column, "time")) {
                            try {
                                value = DateTimeUtils.formatLocalDateTime(DateTimeUtils.parseLocalDateTime(value.toString()));
                                map.put(column,value);
                            } catch (Exception ex) {
                            };
                        }
                    }
                });
			mapList.add(map);
		}

         return new Pagination<>(filePage.getTotal(), filePage.getPageSize(), filePage.getPageNumber(), mapList);
    }

    /**
     * 上传附件
     */
    public Long upload(CoreFileBean coreFile, MultipartFile file) {

        Long fileId = ApplicationContextHelper.getBean(CoreFileService.class).upload(coreFile, file);

        return fileId;
    }

    /**
     * 删除附件
     */
    public LcdpResultDTO delete(RestJsonWrapperBean wrapper) {
        ApplicationContextHelper.getBean(CoreFileService.class).delete(wrapper);
        return new LcdpResultDTO(LcdpConstant.RESULT_CODE_SUCCESS, LcdpConstant.RESULT_MESSAGE_SUCCESS);
    }
}' WHERE ID = 1;
COMMIT;

-- 建表语句
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS T_LCDP_SCRIPT_SOURCE(
     ID BIGINT NOT NULL,
     CLASSNAME VARCHAR(150)  NULL ,
     FULLNAME VARCHAR(360)  NULL ,
     CODESOURCE TEXT NULL,
     PRIMARY KEY (ID)
);
COMMENT ON TABLE T_LCDP_SCRIPT_SOURCE IS '代码源码';
COMMENT ON COLUMN T_LCDP_SCRIPT_SOURCE.id IS '主键';
COMMENT ON COLUMN T_LCDP_SCRIPT_SOURCE.CLASSNAME IS '类名';
COMMENT ON COLUMN T_LCDP_SCRIPT_SOURCE.FULLNAME IS '全类名';
COMMENT ON COLUMN T_LCDP_SCRIPT_SOURCE.CODESOURCE IS '源码';

CREATE INDEX IDX_LCDPSS_FULLNAME ON T_LCDP_SCRIPT_SOURCE (FULLNAME);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS T_LCDP_BP_NODE_SIGN_USER(
     ID BIGINT NOT NULL,
     BPID BIGINT NULL,
     BPNODEID BIGINT NULL,
     BPACTIONID BIGINT NULL,
     USERID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     USERNAME VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYNAME VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
     CREATEDTIME TIMESTAMP NULL,
     CREATEDBYORGID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYORGNAME VARCHAR(270)  NULL,
      PRIMARY KEY (ID)
);
comment on table T_LCDP_BP_NODE_SIGN_USER is '会签用户';
comment on column T_LCDP_BP_NODE_SIGN_USER.id is '主键';
comment on column T_LCDP_BP_NODE_SIGN_USER.bpId is '工作流ID';
comment on column T_LCDP_BP_NODE_SIGN_USER.bpNodeId is '流程节点ID';
comment on column T_LCDP_BP_NODE_SIGN_USER.bpActionId is '流程节点动作ID';
comment on column T_LCDP_BP_NODE_SIGN_USER.userId is '用户ID';
comment on column T_LCDP_BP_NODE_SIGN_USER.userName is '用户名称';
comment on column T_LCDP_BP_NODE_SIGN_USER.createdById is '制单人编码';
comment on column T_LCDP_BP_NODE_SIGN_USER.createdByName is '制单人名称';
comment on column T_LCDP_BP_NODE_SIGN_USER.createdTime is '制单时间';
comment on column T_LCDP_BP_NODE_SIGN_USER.createdByOrgId is '制单人单位编码';
comment on column T_LCDP_BP_NODE_SIGN_USER.createdByOrgName is '制单人单位名称';
CREATE INDEX IDX_LBPNSU_BPACTIONID ON T_LCDP_BP_NODE_SIGN_USER (BPACTIONID);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS T_LCDP_BP_BIZ_SIGN_USER(
     ID BIGINT NOT NULL,
     BPID BIGINT NULL,
     BPCODE VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     TABLENAME VARCHAR(120)  NULL ,
     BIZID BIGINT NULL,
     BPNODEID BIGINT NULL,
     BPNODECODE VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     BPACTIONID BIGINT NULL,
     BPACTIONNAME VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
     BPACTIONCODE VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     USERID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYNAME VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
     CREATEDTIME TIMESTAMP NULL,
     CREATEDBYORGID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYORGNAME VARCHAR(270)  NULL,
      PRIMARY KEY (ID)
);
comment on table T_LCDP_BP_BIZ_SIGN_USER is '工作流节点会签用户';
comment on column T_LCDP_BP_BIZ_SIGN_USER.id is '主键';
comment on column T_LCDP_BP_BIZ_SIGN_USER.bpId is '流程id';
comment on column T_LCDP_BP_BIZ_SIGN_USER.bpCode is '流程编码';
comment on column T_LCDP_BP_BIZ_SIGN_USER.tableName is '表名';
comment on column T_LCDP_BP_BIZ_SIGN_USER.bizId is '业务id';
comment on column T_LCDP_BP_BIZ_SIGN_USER.bpNodeId is '流程节点id';
comment on column T_LCDP_BP_BIZ_SIGN_USER.bpNodeCode is '流程节点编码';
comment on column T_LCDP_BP_BIZ_SIGN_USER.bpActionId is '动作id';
comment on column T_LCDP_BP_BIZ_SIGN_USER.bpActionName is '动作名称';
comment on column T_LCDP_BP_BIZ_SIGN_USER.bpActionCode is '动作编码';
comment on column T_LCDP_BP_BIZ_SIGN_USER.userId is '会签用户编码';
comment on column T_LCDP_BP_BIZ_SIGN_USER.createdById is '制单人编码';
comment on column T_LCDP_BP_BIZ_SIGN_USER.createdByName is '制单人名称';
comment on column T_LCDP_BP_BIZ_SIGN_USER.createdTime is '制单时间';
comment on column T_LCDP_BP_BIZ_SIGN_USER.createdByOrgId is '制单人单位编码';
comment on column T_LCDP_BP_BIZ_SIGN_USER.createdByOrgName is '制单人单位名称';

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS T_LCDP_SUBMIT_LOG(
     ID BIGINT NOT NULL,
     COMMIT VARCHAR(360)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYNAME VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
     CREATEDTIME TIMESTAMP NULL,
     CREATEDBYORGID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYORGNAME VARCHAR(270)  NULL,
      PRIMARY KEY (ID)
);
comment on table T_LCDP_SUBMIT_LOG is '提交日志';
comment on column T_LCDP_SUBMIT_LOG.id is '主键';
comment on column T_LCDP_SUBMIT_LOG.commit is '提交日志';
comment on column T_LCDP_SUBMIT_LOG.createdById is '制单人编码';
comment on column T_LCDP_SUBMIT_LOG.createdByName is '制单人名称';
comment on column T_LCDP_SUBMIT_LOG.createdTime is '制单时间';
comment on column T_LCDP_SUBMIT_LOG.createdByOrgId is '制单人单位编码';
comment on column T_LCDP_SUBMIT_LOG.createdByOrgName is '制单人单位名称';

CALL INSERTI18N('T_LCDP_SUBMIT_LOG.SERVICE_NAME', '提交日志', '提交日志', 'zh-CN', '提交日志');
CALL INSERTI18N('T_LCDP_SUBMIT_LOG.ID', '提交日志的主键', '主键', 'zh-CN', '主键');
CALL INSERTI18N('T_LCDP_SUBMIT_LOG.COMMIT', '提交日志的提交日志', '提交日志', 'zh-CN', '提交日志');
CALL INSERTI18N('T_LCDP_SUBMIT_LOG.CREATEDBYID', '提交日志的制单人编码', '制单人编码', 'zh-CN', '制单人编码');
CALL INSERTI18N('T_LCDP_SUBMIT_LOG.CREATEDBYNAME', '提交日志的制单人名称', '制单人名称', 'zh-CN', '制单人名称');
CALL INSERTI18N('T_LCDP_SUBMIT_LOG.CREATEDTIME', '提交日志的制单时间', '制单时间', 'zh-CN', '制单时间');
CALL INSERTI18N('T_LCDP_SUBMIT_LOG.CREATEDBYORGID', '提交日志的制单人单位编码', '制单人单位编码', 'zh-CN', '制单人单位编码');
CALL INSERTI18N('T_LCDP_SUBMIT_LOG.CREATEDBYORGNAME', '提交日志的制单人单位名称', '制单人单位名称', 'zh-CN', '制单人单位名称');

INSERT INTO T_CORE_TABLE (ID, AUDITABLE, ATTACHMENT)
VALUES ('T_LCDP_SUBMIT_LOG', '0', '0');

COMMIT;

-- 导入时对已提交数据没有更新生效状态导致导入之后 之前的数据也是生效状态数据 处理数据
select * into T_LCDP_RESOURCE_HISTORY_back from T_LCDP_RESOURCE_HISTORY ;
UPDATE T_LCDP_RESOURCE_HISTORY SET EFFECTFLAG ='no';
UPDATE T_LCDP_RESOURCE_HISTORY  SET EFFECTFLAG = 'yes' WHERE ID in(SELECT TLRH .id FROM T_LCDP_RESOURCE tlr JOIN T_LCDP_RESOURCE_HISTORY tlrh  ON TLR.ID = TLRH.RESOURCEID WHERE TLR.EFFECTVERSION = TLRH.VERSION );
COMMIT;

     ID BIGINT NOT NULL,

     CREATEDBYNAME VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
     CREATEDTIME TIMESTAMP NULL,
     CREATEDBYORGID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYORGNAME VARCHAR(270)  NULL,
      PRIMARY KEY (ID)
);

-- 建表语句
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS T_LCDP_VIEW(
     ID BIGINT NOT NULL,
     VIEWNAME VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
     TABLENAME VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
     SELECTSTATEMENT VARCHAR(4000)  NULL ,
     VERSION BIGINT NULL,
     SUBMITFLAG VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYNAME VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
     CREATEDTIME TIMESTAMP NULL,
     CREATEDBYORGID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYORGNAME VARCHAR(270)  NULL,
      PRIMARY KEY (ID)
);
comment on table T_LCDP_VIEW is '低代码平台视图';
comment on column T_LCDP_VIEW.id is '主键';
comment on column T_LCDP_VIEW.viewName is '视图名';
comment on column T_LCDP_VIEW.tableName is '表名';
comment on column T_LCDP_VIEW.selectStatement is '查询语句';
comment on column T_LCDP_VIEW.version is '版本';
comment on column T_LCDP_VIEW.submitFlag is '是否提交';
comment on column T_LCDP_VIEW.createdById is '制单人编码';
comment on column T_LCDP_VIEW.createdByName is '制单人名称';
comment on column T_LCDP_VIEW.createdTime is '制单时间';
comment on column T_LCDP_VIEW.createdByOrgId is '制单人单位编码';
comment on column T_LCDP_VIEW.createdByOrgName is '制单人单位名称';

CALL INSERTI18N('T_LCDP_VIEW.SERVICE_NAME', '低代码平台视图', '低代码平台视图', 'zh-CN', '低代码平台视图');
CALL INSERTI18N('T_LCDP_VIEW.ID', '低代码平台视图的主键', '主键', 'zh-CN', '主键');
CALL INSERTI18N('T_LCDP_VIEW.VIEWNAME', '低代码平台视图的视图名', '视图名', 'zh-CN', '视图名');
CALL INSERTI18N('T_LCDP_VIEW.TABLENAME', '低代码平台视图的表名', '表名', 'zh-CN', '表名');
CALL INSERTI18N('T_LCDP_VIEW.SELECTSTATEMENT', '低代码平台视图的查询语句', '查询语句', 'zh-CN', '查询语句');
CALL INSERTI18N('T_LCDP_VIEW.VERSION', '低代码平台视图的版本', '版本', 'zh-CN', '版本');
CALL INSERTI18N('T_LCDP_VIEW.SUBMITFLAG', '低代码平台视图的是否提交', '是否提交', 'zh-CN', '是否提交');
CALL INSERTI18N('T_LCDP_VIEW.CREATEDBYID', '低代码平台视图的制单人编码', '制单人编码', 'zh-CN', '制单人编码');
CALL INSERTI18N('T_LCDP_VIEW.CREATEDBYNAME', '低代码平台视图的制单人名称', '制单人名称', 'zh-CN', '制单人名称');
CALL INSERTI18N('T_LCDP_VIEW.CREATEDTIME', '低代码平台视图的制单时间', '制单时间', 'zh-CN', '制单时间');
CALL INSERTI18N('T_LCDP_VIEW.CREATEDBYORGID', '低代码平台视图的制单人单位编码', '制单人单位编码', 'zh-CN', '制单人单位编码');
CALL INSERTI18N('T_LCDP_VIEW.CREATEDBYORGNAME', '低代码平台视图的制单人单位名称', '制单人单位名称', 'zh-CN', '制单人单位名称');

-- 建表语句

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS T_LCDP_CHECKOUT_CONFIG(
     ID BIGINT NOT NULL,
     SYSTEMNAME VARCHAR(180)  NULL ,
     SYSTEMURL VARCHAR(360)  NULL ,
     AUTHUSERNAME VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
     LICENSE VARCHAR(180)  NULL ,
     ACTIVATEDFLAG VARCHAR(1)  NULL ,
     ACTIVATEDBYID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     ACTIVATEDBYNAME VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
     ACTIVATEDTIME TIMESTAMP NULL,
     CREATEDBYID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYNAME VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
     CREATEDTIME TIMESTAMP NULL,
     CREATEDBYORGID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS T_LCDP_CHECKIN_CONFIG(
     ID BIGINT NOT NULL,
     SYSTEMNAME VARCHAR(180)  NULL ,
     SYSTEMURL VARCHAR(360)  NULL ,
     AUTHUSERNAME VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
     LICENSE VARCHAR(180)  NULL ,
     ACTIVATEDFLAG VARCHAR(1)  NULL ,
     ACTIVATEDBYID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     ACTIVATEDBYNAME VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
     ACTIVATEDTIME TIMESTAMP NULL,
     CREATEDBYID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYNAME VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
     CREATEDTIME TIMESTAMP NULL,
     CREATEDBYORGID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYORGNAME VARCHAR(270)  NULL,
      PRIMARY KEY (ID)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS T_LCDP_CHECKIN_RECORD(
     ID BIGINT NOT NULL,
     CHECKINNO VARCHAR(18)  NULL ,
     CHECKINNOTE VARCHAR(360)  NULL ,
     CHECKINSTATUS VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CHECKINWAY VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CHECKOUTRECORDID BIGINT NULL,
     CHECKOUTRECORDNO VARCHAR(18)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYNAME VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
     CREATEDTIME TIMESTAMP NULL,
     CREATEDBYORGID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYORGNAME VARCHAR(270)  NULL,
      PRIMARY KEY (ID)
);
comment on table T_LCDP_CHECKIN_RECORD is '迁入记录表';

comment on column T_LCDP_CHECKIN_RECORD.checkinNo is '迁入编号';
comment on column T_LCDP_CHECKIN_RECORD.checkinNote is '迁入说明';
comment on column T_LCDP_CHECKIN_RECORD.checkinStatus is '迁入状态';
comment on column T_LCDP_CHECKIN_RECORD.checkinWay is '迁入方式';
comment on column T_LCDP_CHECKIN_RECORD.checkoutRecordId is '迁出记录ID';
comment on column T_LCDP_CHECKIN_RECORD.checkoutRecordNo is '迁出记录编号';
comment on column T_LCDP_CHECKIN_RECORD.createdById is '制单人编码';
comment on column T_LCDP_CHECKIN_RECORD.createdByName is '制单人名称';
comment on column T_LCDP_CHECKIN_RECORD.createdTime is '制单时间';
comment on column T_LCDP_CHECKIN_RECORD.createdByOrgId is '制单人单位编码';
comment on column T_LCDP_CHECKIN_RECORD.createdByOrgName is '制单人单位名称';

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS T_LCDP_CHECKOUT_RECORD(
     ID BIGINT NOT NULL,
     CHECKOUTNO VARCHAR(18)  NULL ,
     CHECKOUTNOTE VARCHAR(360)  NULL ,
     CONTENT TEXT NULL,
     CHECKINRECORDID BIGINT NULL,
     CREATEDBYID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYNAME VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
     CREATEDTIME TIMESTAMP NULL,
     CREATEDBYORGID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYORGNAME VARCHAR(270)  NULL,
      PRIMARY KEY (ID)
);
comment on table T_LCDP_CHECKOUT_RECORD is '迁出记录表';
comment on column T_LCDP_CHECKOUT_RECORD.id is '主键';
comment on column T_LCDP_CHECKOUT_RECORD.checkoutNo is '迁出编号';
comment on column T_LCDP_CHECKOUT_RECORD.checkoutNote is '迁出说明';
comment on column T_LCDP_CHECKOUT_RECORD.content is '迁出内容';
comment on column T_LCDP_CHECKOUT_RECORD.checkinRecordId is '迁入记录ID';
comment on column T_LCDP_CHECKOUT_RECORD.createdById is '制单人编码';
comment on column T_LCDP_CHECKOUT_RECORD.createdByName is '制单人名称';
comment on column T_LCDP_CHECKOUT_RECORD.createdTime is '制单时间';
comment on column T_LCDP_CHECKOUT_RECORD.createdByOrgId is '制单人单位编码';
comment on column T_LCDP_CHECKOUT_RECORD.createdByOrgName is '制单人单位名称';


CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS T_LCDP_CRD_LOG(
     ID BIGINT NOT NULL,
     CHECKOUTRECORDID BIGINT NULL,
     CHECKOUTTARGET VARCHAR(120)  NULL ,
     CHECKOUTTYPE VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CHECKOUTSTATUS VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYNAME VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
     CREATEDTIME TIMESTAMP NULL,
     CREATEDBYORGID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYORGNAME VARCHAR(270)  NULL,
      PRIMARY KEY (ID)
);
comment on table T_LCDP_CRD_LOG is '迁出记录日志表';
comment on column T_LCDP_CRD_LOG.id is '主键';
comment on column T_LCDP_CRD_LOG.checkoutRecordId is '迁出记录表ID';

comment on column T_LCDP_CRD_LOG.createdById is '制单人编码';
comment on column T_LCDP_CRD_LOG.createdByName is '制单人名称';
comment on column T_LCDP_CRD_LOG.createdTime is '制单时间';
comment on column T_LCDP_CRD_LOG.createdByOrgId is '制单人单位编码';
comment on column T_LCDP_CRD_LOG.createdByOrgName is '制单人单位名称';
CREATE INDEX IDX_LCDP_CRD_LOG_CHECKOUTRECORDID ON T_LCDP_CRD_LOG (CHECKOUTRECORDID);

-- ----------------------------- 2023-05-10 add by yangsz------------begin
UPDATE T_LCDP_RESOURCE SET CLASSCONTENT  ='import com.sunwayworld.framework.context.ApplicationContextHelper;
import com.sunwayworld.framework.data.page.Page;
import com.sunwayworld.framework.data.page.Pagination;
import com.sunwayworld.framework.restful.data.RestJsonWrapperBean;
import com.sunwayworld.module.item.file.bean.CoreFileBean;
import com.sunwayworld.module.item.file.service.CoreFileService;
import org.springframework.web.multipart.MultipartFile;
import com.sunwayworld.cloud.module.lcdp.base.LcdpResultDTO;
import com.sunwayworld.cloud.module.lcdp.support.constant.LcdpConstant;

import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;

import java.util.*;
import com.sunwayworld.framework.utils.*;

public class FileScript {
    /**
    *
    * @param wrapper
    */

   public Page<Map<String, Object>> selectPagination(RestJsonWrapperBean wrapper) {

       Page<CoreFileBean> filePage = ApplicationContextHelper.getBean(CoreFileService.class).selectSearchablePagination(wrapper);
    List<CoreFileBean> rows = filePage.getRows();
    List<Map<String,Object>> mapList = new ArrayList<>();
    for (Object row : rows) {
          Map<String, Object> map = BeanUtils.toMap(row);
               map.forEach((column, value) -> {
                   if (column != null) {
                       // 对于日期和时间，date结尾的只保留年月日，time结尾的保留时分秒
                       if (StringUtils.endsWithIgnoreCase(column, "date")) {
                           try {
                               value = DateTimeUtils.formatLocalDate(DateTimeUtils.parseLocalDate(value.toString()));
                               map.put(column,value);
                           } catch (Exception ex) {
                           };
                       } else if (StringUtils.endsWithIgnoreCase(column, "time")) {
                           try {
                               value = DateTimeUtils.formatLocalDateTime(DateTimeUtils.parseLocalDateTime(value.toString()));
                               map.put(column,value);
                           } catch (Exception ex) {
                           };
                       }
                   }
               });
        mapList.add(map);
    }

        return new Pagination<>(filePage.getTotal(), filePage.getPageSize(), filePage.getPageNumber(), mapList);
   }

   /**
    * 上传附件
    */
   public Long upload(CoreFileBean coreFile, MultipartFile file) {

       Long fileId = ApplicationContextHelper.getBean(CoreFileService.class).upload(coreFile, file);

       return fileId;
   }

   /**
    * 删除附件
    */
   public LcdpResultDTO delete(RestJsonWrapperBean wrapper) {
       ApplicationContextHelper.getBean(CoreFileService.class).delete(wrapper);
       return new LcdpResultDTO(LcdpConstant.RESULT_CODE_SUCCESS, LcdpConstant.RESULT_MESSAGE_SUCCESS);
   }

   /**
    *    修改附件
    */
   public LcdpResultDTO updateData(RestJsonWrapperBean wrapper) {
       ApplicationContextHelper.getBean(CoreFileService.class).save(wrapper);
       return new LcdpResultDTO(LcdpConstant.RESULT_CODE_SUCCESS, LcdpConstant.RESULT_MESSAGE_SUCCESS);
   }
}' WHERE ID = 1;

INSERT INTO T_LCDP_SERVER_SCRIPT_METHOD
(ID, METHODNAME, METHODPATH, SERVERSCRIPTID, DELETEFLAG, DELETEDBYID, DELETETIME, MAPPINGTYPE, METHODDESC)
VALUES(NEXTVAL('SEQ_CORE'), NULL, 'lcdp.file.server.FileScript.updateData', 1, '0', NULL, NULL, 'DEFAULT', NULL);

-- 建表语句

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS T_LCDP_API(
     ID BIGINT NOT NULL,
     APICODE VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
     APINAME VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
     APIURL VARCHAR(300)  NULL ,
     APITYPE VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CALLTYPE VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     APIDESC VARCHAR(512)  NULL ,
     RESTFULMETHOD VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     RESTFULHEADER VARCHAR(1024)  NULL ,
     SCRIPTMETHODPATH VARCHAR(120)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYNAME VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
     CREATEDTIME TIMESTAMP NULL,
     CREATEDBYORGID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYORGNAME VARCHAR(270)  NULL,
      PRIMARY KEY (ID)
);
comment on table T_LCDP_API is '接口集成';
comment on column T_LCDP_API.id is '主键';
comment on column T_LCDP_API.apiCode is '接口编码';
comment on column T_LCDP_API.apiName is '接口名称';
comment on column T_LCDP_API.apiUrl is '接口地址';
comment on column T_LCDP_API.apiType is '接口类型';
comment on column T_LCDP_API.callType is '调用类型';
comment on column T_LCDP_API.apiDesc is '接口描述';
comment on column T_LCDP_API.restfulMethod is 'restful方法';
comment on column T_LCDP_API.restfulHeader is 'restful header';
comment on column T_LCDP_API.scriptMethodPath is '脚本方法';
comment on column T_LCDP_API.createdById is '制单人编码';
comment on column T_LCDP_API.createdByName is '制单人名称';
comment on column T_LCDP_API.createdTime is '制单时间';
comment on column T_LCDP_API.createdByOrgId is '制单人单位编码';
comment on column T_LCDP_API.createdByOrgName is '制单人单位名称';

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS T_LCDP_API_FIELD(
     ID BIGINT NOT NULL,
     APIID BIGINT NOT NULL,
     APIFIELD VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
     SYSTEMFIELD VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
     FIELDDESC VARCHAR(512)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYNAME VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
     CREATEDTIME TIMESTAMP NULL,
     CREATEDBYORGID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYORGNAME VARCHAR(270)  NULL,
      PRIMARY KEY (ID)
);
comment on table T_LCDP_API_FIELD is '接口响应字段映射';
comment on column T_LCDP_API_FIELD.id is '主键';
comment on column T_LCDP_API_FIELD.apiId is '接口主键';
comment on column T_LCDP_API_FIELD.apiField is '接口返回字段';
comment on column T_LCDP_API_FIELD.systemField is '系统字段';
comment on column T_LCDP_API_FIELD.fieldDesc is '字段描述';
comment on column T_LCDP_API_FIELD.createdById is '制单人编码';
comment on column T_LCDP_API_FIELD.createdByName is '制单人名称';
comment on column T_LCDP_API_FIELD.createdTime is '制单时间';
comment on column T_LCDP_API_FIELD.createdByOrgId is '制单人单位编码';
comment on column T_LCDP_API_FIELD.createdByOrgName is '制单人单位名称';
CREATE INDEX IDX_LCDP_API_FIELD_APIID ON T_LCDP_API_FIELD (APIID);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS T_LCDP_API_REQ(
     ID BIGINT NOT NULL,
     APIID BIGINT NULL,
     APICODE VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
     REQUESTDATETIME TIMESTAMP NULL,
     REQUESTBODY TEXT NULL,
     STATUS VARCHAR(12)  NULL ,
     FAILEDCOUNT BIGINT NULL,
      PRIMARY KEY (ID)
);
comment on table T_LCDP_API_REQ is '接口请求';
comment on column T_LCDP_API_REQ.id is '主键';
comment on column T_LCDP_API_REQ.apiId is '接口id';
comment on column T_LCDP_API_REQ.apiCode is '接口编码';
comment on column T_LCDP_API_REQ.requestDatetime is '请求时间';
comment on column T_LCDP_API_REQ.requestBody is '请求体';
comment on column T_LCDP_API_REQ.status is '请求状态（-1失败；0待处理；1成功）';
comment on column T_LCDP_API_REQ.failedCount is '异常次数';
CREATE INDEX IDX_LCDP_API_REQ_APIID ON T_LCDP_API_REQ (APIID);


CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS T_LCDP_API_RES(
     ID BIGINT NOT NULL,
     REQUESTID BIGINT NULL,
     RESPONSEDATETIME TIMESTAMP NULL,
     RESPONSEBODY TEXT NULL,
     LOG TEXT NULL,
     STATUS VARCHAR(12)  NULL,
      PRIMARY KEY (ID)
);
comment on table T_LCDP_API_RES is '接口响应';
comment on column T_LCDP_API_RES.id is '主键';
comment on column T_LCDP_API_RES.requestId is '请求id';
comment on column T_LCDP_API_RES.responseDatetime is '响应时间';
comment on column T_LCDP_API_RES.responseBody is '响应体';
comment on column T_LCDP_API_RES.log is '异常日志';
comment on column T_LCDP_API_RES.status is '响应状态';
CREATE INDEX IDX_LCDP_API_RES_REQUESTID ON T_LCDP_API_RES (REQUESTID);

DROP TABLE T_LCDP_RS_CHECKOUT_RECORD;
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS T_LCDP_RS_CHECKOUT_RECORD(
     ID BIGINT NOT NULL,
     CHECKOUTUSERID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     RESOURCEID BIGINT NULL,
     RESOURCENAME VARCHAR(270)  NULL ,
     RESOURCEDESC VARCHAR(270)  NULL ,
     RESOURCECATEGORY VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     PARENTID BIGINT NULL,
     CHECKOUTTIME TIMESTAMP NULL,
     TABLENAME VARCHAR(120)  NULL ,
     TABLEDESC VARCHAR(270)  NULL,
      PRIMARY KEY (ID)
);
comment on table T_LCDP_RS_CHECKOUT_RECORD is '低代码平台资源检出记录表';
comment on column T_LCDP_RS_CHECKOUT_RECORD.id is '主键';
comment on column T_LCDP_RS_CHECKOUT_RECORD.checkoutUserId is '检出用户ID';
comment on column T_LCDP_RS_CHECKOUT_RECORD.resourceId is '资源Id';
comment on column T_LCDP_RS_CHECKOUT_RECORD.resourceName is '资源名称';
comment on column T_LCDP_RS_CHECKOUT_RECORD.resourceDesc is '资源描述';
comment on column T_LCDP_RS_CHECKOUT_RECORD.resourceCategory is '资源类型';
comment on column T_LCDP_RS_CHECKOUT_RECORD.parentId is '父ID';
comment on column T_LCDP_RS_CHECKOUT_RECORD.checkoutTime is '检出时间';
comment on column T_LCDP_RS_CHECKOUT_RECORD.tableName is '表名';
comment on column T_LCDP_RS_CHECKOUT_RECORD.tableDesc is '表描述';

CALL INSERTI18N('T_LCDP_RS_CHECKOUT_RECORD.ID', '低代码平台资源检出记录表的主键', '主键', 'zh-CN', '主键');
CALL INSERTI18N('T_LCDP_RS_CHECKOUT_RECORD.CHECKOUTUSERID', '低代码平台资源检出记录表的检出用户ID', '检出用户ID', 'zh-CN', '检出用户ID');
CALL INSERTI18N('T_LCDP_RS_CHECKOUT_RECORD.RESOURCEID', '低代码平台资源检出记录表的资源Id', '资源Id', 'zh-CN', '资源Id');
CALL INSERTI18N('T_LCDP_RS_CHECKOUT_RECORD.RESOURCENAME', '低代码平台资源检出记录表的资源名称', '资源名称', 'zh-CN', '资源名称');
CALL INSERTI18N('T_LCDP_RS_CHECKOUT_RECORD.RESOURCEDESC', '低代码平台资源检出记录表的资源描述', '资源描述', 'zh-CN', '资源描述');
CALL INSERTI18N('T_LCDP_RS_CHECKOUT_RECORD.RESOURCECATEGORY', '低代码平台资源检出记录表的资源类型', '资源类型', 'zh-CN', '资源类型');
CALL INSERTI18N('T_LCDP_RS_CHECKOUT_RECORD.PARENTID', '低代码平台资源检出记录表的父ID', '父ID', 'zh-CN', '父ID');
CALL INSERTI18N('T_LCDP_RS_CHECKOUT_RECORD.CHECKOUTTIME', '低代码平台资源检出记录表的检出时间', '检出时间', 'zh-CN', '检出时间');
CALL INSERTI18N('T_LCDP_RS_CHECKOUT_RECORD.TABLENAME', '低代码平台资源检出记录表的表名', '表名', 'zh-CN', '表名');
CALL INSERTI18N('T_LCDP_RS_CHECKOUT_RECORD.TABLEDESC', '低代码平台资源检出记录表的表描述', '表描述', 'zh-CN', '表描述');

-- 建表语句

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS T_LCDP_PAGE_TMPL_COMP(
     ID VARCHAR(36)  NOT NULL ,
     TMPLCONFIGID BIGINT NULL,
     COMPID VARCHAR(18)  NULL ,
     TYPE VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     PARENTID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     PREVIOUSID BIGINT NULL,
     VISIBLE VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     EDITABLE VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CONFIG VARCHAR(4000)  NULL ,
     CONFIGEXTEND VARCHAR(4000)  NULL ,
     COMPTAG VARCHAR(36)  NULL,
      PRIMARY KEY (ID)
);
comment on table T_LCDP_PAGE_TMPL_COMP is '页面模板页面组件表';
comment on column T_LCDP_PAGE_TMPL_COMP.id is '主键';
comment on column T_LCDP_PAGE_TMPL_COMP.tmplConfigId is '模板配置ID';
comment on column T_LCDP_PAGE_TMPL_COMP.compId is '组件ID';
comment on column T_LCDP_PAGE_TMPL_COMP.type is '组件类型';
comment on column T_LCDP_PAGE_TMPL_COMP.parentId is '父组件ID';
comment on column T_LCDP_PAGE_TMPL_COMP.previousId is '前一组件id';
comment on column T_LCDP_PAGE_TMPL_COMP.visible is '是否可见';
comment on column T_LCDP_PAGE_TMPL_COMP.editable is '是否可编辑';
comment on column T_LCDP_PAGE_TMPL_COMP.config is '组件配置';
comment on column T_LCDP_PAGE_TMPL_COMP.configExtend is '组件配置扩展';
comment on column T_LCDP_PAGE_TMPL_COMP.compTag is '页面组件标记 记录组件作用';
CREATE INDEX IDX_LCDP_PTCT_CONFIGID ON T_LCDP_PAGE_TMPL_COMP (TMPLCONFIGID);



CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS T_LCDP_PAGE_TMPL(
     ID BIGINT NOT NULL,
     PAGETMPLNAME VARCHAR(270)  NULL ,
     CHILDTABLEFLAG VARCHAR(1)  NULL,
      PRIMARY KEY (ID)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS T_LCDP_MODULE_PAGE_I18N(
     ID BIGINT NOT NULL,
     MODULEPAGEID BIGINT NULL,
     MODULEPAGEHISTORYID BIGINT NULL,
     CODE VARCHAR(128)  NULL ,
     I18NCONFIGID VARCHAR(32)  NULL ,
     MESSAGE VARCHAR(300)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYNAME VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
     CREATEDTIME TIMESTAMP NULL,
     CREATEDBYORGID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYORGNAME VARCHAR(270)  NULL,
      PRIMARY KEY (ID)
);
comment on table T_LCDP_MODULE_PAGE_I18N is '功能模块页面国际化表';
comment on column T_LCDP_MODULE_PAGE_I18N.id is '主键';
comment on column T_LCDP_MODULE_PAGE_I18N.modulePageId is '页面资源主键';
comment on column T_LCDP_MODULE_PAGE_I18N.modulePageHistoryId is '历史页面资源主键';
comment on column T_LCDP_MODULE_PAGE_I18N.code is '国际化编码';
comment on column T_LCDP_MODULE_PAGE_I18N.i18nConfigId is '国际化配置主键';
comment on column T_LCDP_MODULE_PAGE_I18N.message is '国际化信息';
comment on column T_LCDP_MODULE_PAGE_I18N.createdById is '制单人编码';
comment on column T_LCDP_MODULE_PAGE_I18N.createdByName is '制单人名称';
comment on column T_LCDP_MODULE_PAGE_I18N.createdTime is '制单时间';
comment on column T_LCDP_MODULE_PAGE_I18N.createdByOrgId is '制单人单位编码';
comment on column T_LCDP_MODULE_PAGE_I18N.createdByOrgName is '制单人单位名称';
CREATE INDEX IDX_LCDP_I18N_HISTORYID ON T_LCDP_MODULE_PAGE_I18N (MODULEPAGEHISTORYID);

INSERT INTO T_CORE_TABLE (ID, AUDITABLE, ATTACHMENT)
VALUES ('T_LCDP_MODULE_PAGE_I18N', '0', '0');

COMMIT;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS T_LCDP_SUBMIT_LOG_TMPL(
     ID BIGINT NOT NULL,
     ELEMENTS VARCHAR(300)  NULL ,
     TMPLCONTENT VARCHAR(300)  NULL ,
     CHECKFLAG VARCHAR(3)  NULL ,
     ACTIVATEDFLAG VARCHAR(3)  NULL ,
     ACTIVATEDBYID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     ACTIVATEDBYNAME VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
     ACTIVATEDTIME TIMESTAMP NULL,
     CREATEDBYID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYNAME VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
     CREATEDTIME TIMESTAMP NULL,
     CREATEDBYORGID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYORGNAME VARCHAR(270)  NULL,
      PRIMARY KEY (ID)
);
comment on table T_LCDP_SUBMIT_LOG_TMPL is '提交日志模板表';
comment on column T_LCDP_SUBMIT_LOG_TMPL.id is '主键';
comment on column T_LCDP_SUBMIT_LOG_TMPL.elements is '模板要素';
comment on column T_LCDP_SUBMIT_LOG_TMPL.tmplContent is '模板内容';
comment on column T_LCDP_SUBMIT_LOG_TMPL.checkFlag is '是否校验';
comment on column T_LCDP_SUBMIT_LOG_TMPL.activatedFlag is '启用标志';
comment on column T_LCDP_SUBMIT_LOG_TMPL.activatedById is '启用/停用人编码';
comment on column T_LCDP_SUBMIT_LOG_TMPL.activatedByName is '启用/停用人名称';
comment on column T_LCDP_SUBMIT_LOG_TMPL.activatedTime is '启用/停用时间';
comment on column T_LCDP_SUBMIT_LOG_TMPL.createdById is '制单人编码';
comment on column T_LCDP_SUBMIT_LOG_TMPL.createdByName is '制单人名称';
comment on column T_LCDP_SUBMIT_LOG_TMPL.createdTime is '制单时间';
comment on column T_LCDP_SUBMIT_LOG_TMPL.createdByOrgId is '制单人单位编码';
comment on column T_LCDP_SUBMIT_LOG_TMPL.createdByOrgName is '制单人单位名称';

CALL INSERTI18N('T_LCDP_SUBMIT_LOG_TMPL.TMPLCONTENT', '提交日志模板表的模板内容', '模板内容', 'zh-CN', '模板内容');

CALL INSERTI18N('T_LCDP_SUBMIT_LOG_TMPL.CREATEDBYID', '提交日志模板表的制单人编码', '制单人编码', 'zh-CN', '制单人编码');

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS T_LCDP_PAGE_I18N_CODE(
     ID BIGINT NOT NULL,
     CODE VARCHAR(128)  NULL ,
     MODULEPAGEID BIGINT NULL,
     MODULEPAGEHISTORYID BIGINT NULL,
     CREATEDBYID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYNAME VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
     CREATEDTIME TIMESTAMP NULL,
     CREATEDBYORGID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYORGNAME VARCHAR(270)  NULL,
      PRIMARY KEY (ID)
);
comment on table T_LCDP_PAGE_I18N_CODE is '页面国际化关联表';
comment on column T_LCDP_PAGE_I18N_CODE.id is '主键';
comment on column T_LCDP_PAGE_I18N_CODE.code is '系统国际化编码';
comment on column T_LCDP_PAGE_I18N_CODE.modulePageId is '页面资源主键';
comment on column T_LCDP_PAGE_I18N_CODE.modulePageHistoryId is '历史页面资源主键';
comment on column T_LCDP_PAGE_I18N_CODE.createdById is '制单人编码';
comment on column T_LCDP_PAGE_I18N_CODE.createdByName is '制单人名称';

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS T_LCDP_ERROR_SCRIPT(
     ID BIGINT NOT NULL,
     SERVERSCRIPTID BIGINT NULL,
     SCRIPTNAME VARCHAR(120)  NULL ,
     ERRORLOG VARCHAR(3600)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYNAME VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
     CREATEDTIME TIMESTAMP NULL,
     CREATEDBYORGID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYORGNAME VARCHAR(270)  NULL ,
     SCRIPTCONTENT TEXT NULL,
     SCRIPTPATH VARCHAR(360)  NULL,
      PRIMARY KEY (ID)
);
comment on table T_LCDP_ERROR_SCRIPT is 'java脚本加载错误记录表';
comment on column T_LCDP_ERROR_SCRIPT.id is '主键';
comment on column T_LCDP_ERROR_SCRIPT.serverScriptId is '服务端脚本ID';
comment on column T_LCDP_ERROR_SCRIPT.scriptName is '服务端脚本名称';
comment on column T_LCDP_ERROR_SCRIPT.errorLog is '报错日志';
comment on column T_LCDP_ERROR_SCRIPT.createdById is '制单人编码';
comment on column T_LCDP_ERROR_SCRIPT.createdByName is '制单人名称';
comment on column T_LCDP_ERROR_SCRIPT.createdTime is '制单时间';
comment on column T_LCDP_ERROR_SCRIPT.createdByOrgId is '制单人单位编码';
comment on column T_LCDP_ERROR_SCRIPT.createdByOrgName is '制单人单位名称';
comment on column T_LCDP_ERROR_SCRIPT.scriptContent is '脚本内容';
comment on column T_LCDP_ERROR_SCRIPT.scriptPath is '脚本路径';

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS T_LCDP_RESOURCE_FILE(
     ID BIGINT NOT NULL,
     FILENAME VARCHAR(360)  NULL ,
     FILECONTENT TEXT NULL,
     FILEEXT VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     FILEPATH VARCHAR(360)  NULL ,
     RELATIVEPATH VARCHAR(360)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYNAME VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
     CREATEDTIME TIMESTAMP NULL,
     CREATEDBYORGID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYORGNAME VARCHAR(270)  NULL,
      PRIMARY KEY (ID)
);
comment on table T_LCDP_RESOURCE_FILE is '低代码脚本附件表';
comment on column T_LCDP_RESOURCE_FILE.id is '主键';
comment on column T_LCDP_RESOURCE_FILE.fileName is '文件名称';
comment on column T_LCDP_RESOURCE_FILE.fileContent is '文件内容';
comment on column T_LCDP_RESOURCE_FILE.fileExt is '文件扩展名';
comment on column T_LCDP_RESOURCE_FILE.filePath is '文件路径';
comment on column T_LCDP_RESOURCE_FILE.relativePath is '相对路径';
comment on column T_LCDP_RESOURCE_FILE.createdById is '制单人编码';
comment on column T_LCDP_RESOURCE_FILE.createdByName is '制单人名称';
comment on column T_LCDP_RESOURCE_FILE.createdTime is '制单时间';
comment on column T_LCDP_RESOURCE_FILE.createdByOrgId is '制单人单位编码';
comment on column T_LCDP_RESOURCE_FILE.createdByOrgName is '制单人单位名称';

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS T_LCDP_KEYMAP(
  ID BIGINT NOT NULL,
  COMMAND VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
  DESCRIPTION VARCHAR(120) NULL,
  BINDING VARCHAR(120)  NULL ,
  CATEGORY VARCHAR(12)  NULL ,
  TEMPLATE TEXT  NULL ,
   PRIMARY KEY (ID)
);

COMMENT ON TABLE T_LCDP_KEYMAP IS '低代码代码快捷键';
COMMENT ON COLUMN T_LCDP_KEYMAP.ID IS '主键';
COMMENT ON COLUMN T_LCDP_KEYMAP.COMMAND IS '命令名称';
COMMENT ON COLUMN T_LCDP_KEYMAP.DESCRIPTION IS '命令描述';
COMMENT ON COLUMN T_LCDP_KEYMAP.BINDING IS '绑定的快捷键';
COMMENT ON COLUMN T_LCDP_KEYMAP.CATEGORY IS '命令分类';
COMMENT ON COLUMN T_LCDP_KEYMAP.TEMPLATE IS '模板代码';

alter table T_LCDP_RESOURCE add CHECKOUTTIME TIMESTAMP;
comment on column T_LCDP_RESOURCE.CHECKOUTTIME is '检出时间';
alter table T_LCDP_RESOURCE add CHECKOUTUSERID VARCHAR(36);
comment on column T_LCDP_RESOURCE.CHECKOUTUSERID is '检出人编码';

-- 处理历史数据
UPDATE T_LCDP_RESOURCE R SET CHECKOUTUSERID = (SELECT H.CREATEDBYID FROM T_LCDP_RESOURCE_HISTORY H WHERE H.RESOURCEID = R.ID AND H.SUBMITFLAG = 'no' AND H.DELETEFLAG = '0')
WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM T_LCDP_RESOURCE_HISTORY H WHERE H.RESOURCEID = R.ID AND H.SUBMITFLAG = 'no' AND H.DELETEFLAG = '0' );
UPDATE T_LCDP_RESOURCE R SET CHECKOUTTIME = (SELECT H.CREATEDTIME FROM T_LCDP_RESOURCE_HISTORY H WHERE H.RESOURCEID = R.ID AND H.SUBMITFLAG = 'no' AND H.DELETEFLAG = '0')
WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM T_LCDP_RESOURCE_HISTORY H WHERE H.RESOURCEID = R.ID AND H.SUBMITFLAG = 'no'  AND H.DELETEFLAG = '0');
COMMIT;

-- 建表语句

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS T_LCDP_VIEW_BUTTON_ROLE(
     ID BIGINT NOT NULL,
     MENUID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     RESOURCEID BIGINT NULL,
     RESOURCEHISTORYID BIGINT NULL,
     PARENTID BIGINT NULL,
     RESOURCENAME VARCHAR(360)  NULL ,
     EFFECTVERSION BIGINT NULL,
     BUTTONDATAID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     BUTTONID VARCHAR(270)  NULL ,
     BUTTONPARENTID VARCHAR(270)  NULL ,
     BUTTONPARENTNAME VARCHAR(270)  NULL ,
     VISIBLEROLES VARCHAR(72)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYNAME VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
     CREATEDTIME TIMESTAMP NULL,
     CREATEDBYORGID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYORGNAME VARCHAR(270)  NULL ,
     BUTTONNAME VARCHAR(270)  NULL,
      PRIMARY KEY (ID)
);
comment on table T_LCDP_VIEW_BUTTON_ROLE is '页面按钮权限';
comment on column T_LCDP_VIEW_BUTTON_ROLE.id is '主键';
comment on column T_LCDP_VIEW_BUTTON_ROLE.menuId is '菜单编码';
comment on column T_LCDP_VIEW_BUTTON_ROLE.resourceId is '资源ID';
comment on column T_LCDP_VIEW_BUTTON_ROLE.resourceHistoryId is '资源历史表ID';
comment on column T_LCDP_VIEW_BUTTON_ROLE.parentId is '父页面ID';
comment on column T_LCDP_VIEW_BUTTON_ROLE.resourceName is '资源名称';
comment on column T_LCDP_VIEW_BUTTON_ROLE.effectVersion is '生效版本';
comment on column T_LCDP_VIEW_BUTTON_ROLE.buttonDataId is '按钮数据ID';
comment on column T_LCDP_VIEW_BUTTON_ROLE.buttonId is '按钮ID';
comment on column T_LCDP_VIEW_BUTTON_ROLE.buttonParentId is '按钮父节点ID(如果遍历得到有tabpanel则是tablePanel)';
comment on column T_LCDP_VIEW_BUTTON_ROLE.buttonParentName is '按钮父节点ID(如果遍历得到有tabpanel则是tablePanel)';
comment on column T_LCDP_VIEW_BUTTON_ROLE.visibleRoles is '是否可见';
comment on column T_LCDP_VIEW_BUTTON_ROLE.createdById is '制单人编码';
comment on column T_LCDP_VIEW_BUTTON_ROLE.createdByName is '制单人名称';
comment on column T_LCDP_VIEW_BUTTON_ROLE.createdTime is '制单时间';
comment on column T_LCDP_VIEW_BUTTON_ROLE.createdByOrgId is '制单人单位编码';
comment on column T_LCDP_VIEW_BUTTON_ROLE.createdByOrgName is '制单人单位名称';
comment on column T_LCDP_VIEW_BUTTON_ROLE.buttonName is '按钮名称';

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS T_LCDP_HISTROY_CLEAN_BACK(
     ID BIGINT NOT NULL,
     RESOURCEID BIGINT NULL,
     RESOURCENAME VARCHAR(270)  NULL ,
     RESOURCECATEGORY VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CONTENT TEXT NULL,
     CLASSCONTENT TEXT NULL,
     VERSION BIGINT NULL,
     SUBMITFLAG VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     EFFECTFLAG VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     PATH VARCHAR(400)  NULL ,
     MODIFYVERSION BIGINT NULL,
     COMPILEDVERSION BIGINT NULL,
     DELETEFLAG VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     DELETEDBYID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     DELETETIME TIMESTAMP NULL,
     SCRIPTTYPE VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     EVENTNAME VARCHAR(270)  NULL ,
     LCDPFILEPATH VARCHAR(720)  NULL ,
     VERSIONOFFSET BIGINT NULL,
     CREATEDBYID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYNAME VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
     CREATEDTIME TIMESTAMP NULL,
     CREATEDBYORGID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYORGNAME VARCHAR(270)  NULL,
      PRIMARY KEY (ID)
);
comment on table T_LCDP_HISTROY_CLEAN_BACK is '历史表瘦身备份表';
comment on column T_LCDP_HISTROY_CLEAN_BACK.id is '主键';
comment on column T_LCDP_HISTROY_CLEAN_BACK.resourceId is '资源ID';

comment on column T_LCDP_HISTROY_CLEAN_BACK.resourceCategory is '资源类型';
comment on column T_LCDP_HISTROY_CLEAN_BACK.content is '内容';
comment on column T_LCDP_HISTROY_CLEAN_BACK.classContent is '类内容';
comment on column T_LCDP_HISTROY_CLEAN_BACK.version is '版本';
comment on column T_LCDP_HISTROY_CLEAN_BACK.submitFlag is '是否提交';
comment on column T_LCDP_HISTROY_CLEAN_BACK.effectFlag is '是否生效';
comment on column T_LCDP_HISTROY_CLEAN_BACK.path is '资源路径';
comment on column T_LCDP_HISTROY_CLEAN_BACK.modifyVersion is '修改版本';
comment on column T_LCDP_HISTROY_CLEAN_BACK.compiledVersion is '已编译版本';
comment on column T_LCDP_HISTROY_CLEAN_BACK.deleteFlag is '删除标记';

comment on column T_LCDP_HISTROY_CLEAN_BACK.deleteTime is '删除时间';
comment on column T_LCDP_HISTROY_CLEAN_BACK.scriptType is '脚本类型';
comment on column T_LCDP_HISTROY_CLEAN_BACK.eventName is '事件名称';

comment on column T_LCDP_HISTROY_CLEAN_BACK.createdByName is '制单人名称';

comment on column T_LCDP_HISTROY_CLEAN_BACK.createdByOrgId is '制单人单位编码';
comment on column T_LCDP_HISTROY_CLEAN_BACK.createdByOrgName is '制单人单位名称';


CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS T_LCDP_COMP_CLEAN_BACK(
     ID VARCHAR(36)  NOT NULL ,
     MODULEPAGEHISTORYID BIGINT NULL,
     MODULEPAGEID BIGINT NULL,
     MODULEPAGEVERSION BIGINT NULL,
     TYPE VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     PARENTID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CONFIG TEXT NULL,
     COMPARECOLUMN VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYNAME VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
     CREATEDTIME TIMESTAMP NULL,
     CREATEDBYORGID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYORGNAME VARCHAR(270)  NULL,
      PRIMARY KEY (ID)
);
comment on table T_LCDP_COMP_CLEAN_BACK is '组件表瘦身备份';
comment on column T_LCDP_COMP_CLEAN_BACK.id is '主键';
comment on column T_LCDP_COMP_CLEAN_BACK.modulePageHistoryId is '模块页面历史ID';
comment on column T_LCDP_COMP_CLEAN_BACK.modulePageId is '模块页面ID';
comment on column T_LCDP_COMP_CLEAN_BACK.modulePageVersion is '模块页面版本';
comment on column T_LCDP_COMP_CLEAN_BACK.type is '组件类型';
comment on column T_LCDP_COMP_CLEAN_BACK.parentId is '父组件ID';
comment on column T_LCDP_COMP_CLEAN_BACK.config is '组件配置';
comment on column T_LCDP_COMP_CLEAN_BACK.compareColumn is '对比字段';
comment on column T_LCDP_COMP_CLEAN_BACK.createdById is '制单人编码';
comment on column T_LCDP_COMP_CLEAN_BACK.createdByName is '制单人名称';
comment on column T_LCDP_COMP_CLEAN_BACK.createdTime is '制单时间';
comment on column T_LCDP_COMP_CLEAN_BACK.createdByOrgId is '制单人单位编码';
comment on column T_LCDP_COMP_CLEAN_BACK.createdByOrgName is '制单人单位名称';


INSERT INTO T_CORE_TABLE (ID, AUDITABLE, ATTACHMENT)
VALUES ('T_LCDP_HISTROY_CLEAN_BACK', '0', '0');
INSERT INTO T_CORE_TABLE (ID, AUDITABLE, ATTACHMENT)
VALUES ('T_LCDP_COMP_CLEAN_BACK', '0', '0');

     ID BIGINT NOT NULL,
     BUTTONNAME VARCHAR(360)  NULL ,
     SCRIPTREQUIRED BIGINT NULL,
     BUTTONCONFIG TEXT NULL,
     BUTTONCONTENT TEXT NULL,
     CREATEDBYID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYNAME VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
     CREATEDTIME TIMESTAMP NULL,
     CREATEDBYORGID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYORGNAME VARCHAR(270)  NULL,
      PRIMARY KEY (ID)
);

comment on column T_LCDP_BUTTON_TMPL.createdByOrgName is '制单人单位名称';

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS T_LCDP_R_IMPORT_RECORD_DETAIL(
     ID BIGINT NOT NULL,
     RECORDID BIGINT NULL,
     RESOURCEID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     RESOURCEVERSION BIGINT NULL,
     CREATEDBYID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYNAME VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
     CREATEDTIME TIMESTAMP NULL,
     CREATEDBYORGID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYORGNAME VARCHAR(270)  NULL ,
     RESOURCECATEGORY VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     DELETEFLAG VARCHAR(1)  NULL ,
     RESOURCEOPERATIONS VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     ROLLBACKABLE VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     OPERATIONVERSION BIGINT NULL,
      PRIMARY KEY (ID)
);
comment on table T_LCDP_R_IMPORT_RECORD_DETAIL is '导入记录详细表';
comment on column T_LCDP_R_IMPORT_RECORD_DETAIL.id is '主键';
comment on column T_LCDP_R_IMPORT_RECORD_DETAIL.recordId is '记录表ID';
comment on column T_LCDP_R_IMPORT_RECORD_DETAIL.resourceId is '迁入后资源Id（资源或者表）';
comment on column T_LCDP_R_IMPORT_RECORD_DETAIL.resourceVersion is '迁入后资源版本';

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS T_LCDP_TABLE_FIELD_GROUP(
     ID BIGINT NOT NULL,
     PARENTID BIGINT NULL,
     FIELDNAME VARCHAR(90)  NULL ,
     FIELDCOMMENT VARCHAR(120)  NULL ,
     FIELDTYPE VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     FIELDLENGTH VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     PRECISION BIGINT NULL,
     SCALE BIGINT NULL,
     ALLOWNULL VARCHAR(1)  NULL ,
     DEFAULTVALUE VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
     FIELDSTATUS VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     ORDERNO BIGINT NULL,
     GROUPFLAG BIGINT NULL,
     I18NCODE VARCHAR(240)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYNAME VARCHAR(60)  NULL ,
     CREATEDTIME TIMESTAMP NULL,
     CREATEDBYORGID VARCHAR(36)  NULL ,
     CREATEDBYORGNAME VARCHAR(270)  NULL,
      PRIMARY KEY (ID)
);
comment on table T_LCDP_TABLE_FIELD_GROUP is '常用表字段分组';
comment on column T_LCDP_TABLE_FIELD_GROUP.id is '主键';
comment on column T_LCDP_TABLE_FIELD_GROUP.parentId is '父级ID';
comment on column T_LCDP_TABLE_FIELD_GROUP.fieldName is '字段名称';
comment on column T_LCDP_TABLE_FIELD_GROUP.fieldComment is '字段注释';
comment on column T_LCDP_TABLE_FIELD_GROUP.fieldType is '字段类型 (varchar字符串、number数字、clob大文本、date日期)';
comment on column T_LCDP_TABLE_FIELD_GROUP.fieldLength is '字段长度';
comment on column T_LCDP_TABLE_FIELD_GROUP.precision is '精度';
comment on column T_LCDP_TABLE_FIELD_GROUP.scale is '刻度';
comment on column T_LCDP_TABLE_FIELD_GROUP.allowNull is '是否可为空';
comment on column T_LCDP_TABLE_FIELD_GROUP.defaultValue is '默认值';
comment on column T_LCDP_TABLE_FIELD_GROUP.fieldStatus is '字段状态';
comment on column T_LCDP_TABLE_FIELD_GROUP.orderNo is '排序码';
comment on column T_LCDP_TABLE_FIELD_GROUP.groupFlag is '是否为分组';

-- ----------------------------- 2026-03-21 add by shixw------------begin
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS t_lcdp_resource_convert_record (
    id bigint NOT NULL,
    resourceid bigint NOT NULL,
    moduleid bigint NULL,
    modulename varchar(120) NULL,
    resourcename varchar(120) NULL,
    resourcecategory varchar(60) NULL,
    resourcepath varchar(500) NULL,
    outputroot varchar(500) NULL,
    convertstatus varchar(30) NULL,
    generatedfiles text NULL,
    createdbyid varchar(50) NULL,
    createdbyname varchar(120) NULL,
    createdtime timestamp NULL,
    createdbyorgid varchar(50) NULL,
    createdbyorgname varchar(120) NULL,
    lastupdatedbyid varchar(50) NULL,
    lastupdatedbyname varchar(120) NULL,
    lastupdatedtime timestamp NULL,
    CONSTRAINT pk_t_lcdp_resource_convert_record PRIMARY KEY (id)
);
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS uk_lcdp_rs_convert_record_01 ON t_lcdp_resource_convert_record(resourceid);
COMMENT ON TABLE t_lcdp_resource_convert_record IS '低代码资源转源码记录表';

COMMIT;
-- ----------------------------- 2026-03-21 add by shixw------------end
